{
  "content": "/**\n * PulseSphere SocialOps\n * -------------------------------------------------------\n * Module: module_17 \u2013 Social-Aware Auto-Scaler & Alerting\n *\n * This module wires together multiple classic patterns to\n * provide a production-grade, socially-aware auto-scaling\n * component.\n *\n * Patterns in use\n *  \u2022 Observer            \u2013 MetricEventBus (EventEmitter)\n *  \u2022 Strategy            \u2013 ScalingStrategy implementations\n *  \u2022 Command             \u2013 Scale{Up,Down}Command\n *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility \u2013 AlertHandler chain (uses NotificationService)\n *  \u2022 Event Driven        \u2013 Kafka consumer feeding the bus\n *\n * External deps\n *  \u2022 kafkajs             \u2013 High-throughput metric ingestion\n *  \u2022 axios               \u2013 Mock service-mesh HTTP client\n *\n * Author:  PulseSphere SRE Platform Team\n * -------------------------------------------------------\n */\n\nimport { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { Kafka, EachMessagePayload, logLevel as KafkaLogLevel } from 'kafkajs';\nimport axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios';\nimport { notificationService, AlertMessage } from './services/notificationService';\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Static typings                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/** A single enriched metric coming from pulse-fusion pipeline. */\nexport interface EnrichedMetric {\n  readonly appId: string;\n  readonly cpuPct: number;               // 0-100\n  readonly memPct: number;               // 0-100\n  readonly sentimentScore: number;       // \u20131 .. +1\n  readonly trendingScore: number;        // 0 .. 1 (probability of virality)\n  readonly timestamp: number;            // epoch ms\n}\n\nexport enum ScalingDecision {\n  SCALE_UP   = 'SCALE_UP',\n  SCALE_DOWN = 'SCALE_DOWN',\n  STABLE     = 'STABLE',\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Observer Layer                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Central in-process event bus \u2013 translates Kafka messages into local events\n * that strategies/handlers can subscribe to without needing Kafka semantics.\n */\nclass MetricEventBus extends EventEmitter {\n  static readonly EVT_METRIC = 'metric';\n\n  emitMetric(metric: EnrichedMetric): void {\n    this.emit(MetricEventBus.EVT_METRIC, metric);\n  }\n\n  onMetric(listener: (metric: EnrichedMetric) => void): void {\n    this.on(MetricEventBus.EVT_METRIC, listener);\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                           Strategy & Command Layer                         */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/** Scaling command contract (Command Pattern). */\ninterface ScalingCommand {\n  execute(): Promise<void>;\n}\n\n/** Concrete command \u2013 scale up by N replicas. */\nclass ScaleUpCommand implements ScalingCommand {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly appId: string,\n    private readonly factor: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  public async execute(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.meshClient.scale(this.appId, this.factor);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Concrete command \u2013 scale down by N replicas. */\nclass ScaleDownCommand implements ScalingCommand {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly appId: string,\n    private readonly factor: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  public async execute(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.meshClient.scale(this.appId, -this.factor);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Strategy contract \u2013 returns a Command or undefined when no action. */\ninterface ScalingStrategy {\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined;\n}\n\n/**\n * CPU-centric strategy \u2013 reacts when usage is beyond a threshold.\n * This is a simplistic threshold-based algorithm; production code\n * would rely on predictive analytics or RL models.\n */\nclass HighCpuStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly highWaterMarkPct = 75,\n    private readonly lowWaterMarkPct  = 35,\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined {\n    if (metric.cpuPct >= this.highWaterMarkPct) {\n      const factor = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(metric.cpuPct / 25));\n      return new ScaleUpCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, factor);\n    }\n    if (metric.cpuPct <= this.lowWaterMarkPct) {\n      return new ScaleDownCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, 1);\n    }\n    return undefined;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Sentiment spike strategy \u2013 anticipates virality before infrastructure\n * gets hammered. Combines sentiment & trending scores.\n */\nclass SentimentSpikeStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly threshold = 0.85,\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined {\n    if (metric.trendingScore >= this.threshold && metric.sentimentScore > 0) {\n      // For viral events we aggressively over-provision.\n      return new ScaleUpCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, 3);\n    }\n    return undefined;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                          Chain-of-Responsibility Layer                     */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\ninterface AlertHandler {\n  setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler;\n  handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void>;\n}\n\nabstract class BaseAlertHandler implements AlertHandler {\n  private nextHandler?: AlertHandler;\n\n  public setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = handler;\n    return handler;\n  }\n\n  public async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.nextHandler) {\n      await this.nextHandler.handle(metric);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/** Debug-level handler \u2013 just noisy logs in dev environments. */\nclass DebugAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {\n      console.debug(\n        `[DEBUG] Metric \u2192 cpu:${metric.cpuPct}% mem:${metric.memPct}% ` +\n        `sentiment:${metric.sentimentScore.toFixed(2)} trending:${metric.trendingScore}`,\n      );\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Warning-level handler \u2013 triggers alert via NotificationService. */\nclass WarningAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (metric.cpuPct > 85 || metric.memPct > 85) {\n      const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n        severity: 'warning',\n        title: `High resource usage on app ${metric.appId}`,\n        details: {\n          appId: metric.appId,\n          cpuPct: metric.cpuPct,\n          memPct: metric.memPct,\n          sentimentScore: metric.sentimentScore,\n          trendingScore: metric.trendingScore,\n        },\n        sourceModule: 'module_17',\n      };\n      await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Critical handler \u2013 immediate critical alert via NotificationService. */\nclass CriticalAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    const isCrit = metric.cpuPct > 95 || metric.memPct > 95 || metric.trendingScore >= 0.95;\n    if (isCrit) {\n      const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n        severity: 'critical',\n        title: `CRITICAL: ${metric.appId} likely overloaded!`,\n        details: {\n          appId: metric.appId,\n          cpuPct: metric.cpuPct,\n          memPct: metric.memPct,\n          sentimentScore: metric.sentimentScore,\n          trendingScore: metric.trendingScore,\n        },\n        sourceModule: 'module_17',\n      };\n      await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Service-mesh client                           */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass ServiceMeshClient {\n  private readonly http: AxiosInstance;\n\n  constructor(\n    readonly baseURL: string = process.env.SERVICE_MESH_BASE_URL ?? 'http://mesh-gateway',\n    readonly timeout = 5_000,\n  ) {\n    this.http = axios.create({ baseURL: this.baseURL, timeout: this.timeout });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Scale an application up/down by \"factor\" replicas.\n   * This interacts with the platform orchestrator through\n   * the mesh sidecar.\n   */\n  public async scale(appId: string, factor: number): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      await this.http.post(`/apps/${appId}/scale`, { factor });\n      console.info(`[Scale] ${appId} scaled by ${factor}`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(`[Scale] Failed to scale ${appId}:`, err);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                            Main Orchestrator Class                         */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nexport class SocialAwareAutoScaler {\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private readonly meshClient = new ServiceMeshClient();\n  private readonly eventBus = new MetricEventBus();\n  private readonly strategies: ScalingStrategy[] = [];\n  private readonly alertChain: AlertHandler;\n  private isShuttingDown = false;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly kafkaBrokers: string[] = (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS ?? 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n    private readonly groupId = 'social-auto-scaler',\n    private readonly topic = 'pulse.metric.enriched.v1',\n  ) {\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({\n      clientId: 'pulse-auto-scaler',\n      brokers: this.kafkaBrokers,\n      logLevel: KafkaLogLevel.NOTHING,\n    });\n\n    /* Strategy registry */\n    this.strategies.push(\n      new HighCpuStrategy(this.meshClient),\n      new SentimentSpikeStrategy(this.meshClient),\n    );\n\n    /* Alert chain bootstrap */\n    const debug   = new DebugAlertHandler();\n    const warn    = new WarningAlertHandler();\n    const crit    = new CriticalAlertHandler();\n    debug.setNext(warn).setNext(crit);\n    this.alertChain = debug; // entrypoint\n\n    /* Wiring observer */\n    this.eventBus.onMetric(async (metric) => {\n      await this.alertChain.handle(metric);\n      await this.applyStrategies(metric);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize kafka consumer & begin event pump.\n   */\n  public async start(): Promise<void> {\n    const consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId: this.groupId });\n    await consumer.connect();\n    await consumer.subscribe({ topic: this.topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    console.info('[AutoScaler] started.');\n\n    await consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        if (this.isShuttingDown) {\n          await consumer.disconnect();\n          return;\n        }\n        const metric = this.parseMetric(payload);\n        if (metric) this.eventBus.emitMetric(metric);\n      },\n    });\n\n    /* Graceful shutdown binding */\n    process.once('SIGINT' , () => this.shutdown());\n    process.once('SIGTERM', () => this.shutdown());\n  }\n\n  private async applyStrategies(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    for (const strategy of this.strategies) {\n      const cmd = strategy.evaluate(metric);\n      if (cmd) {\n        try {\n          await cmd.execute();\n          break; // one strategy acted \u2013 avoid conflicting actions\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('[AutoScaler] Command failed:', err);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Converts Kafka payload into EnrichedMetric object with validation.\n   */\n  private parseMetric({ message }: EachMessagePayload): EnrichedMetric | undefined {\n    try {\n      if (!message.value) return;\n      const obj = JSON.parse(message.value.toString());\n\n      /* Lightweight validation */\n      const metric: EnrichedMetric = {\n        appId          : obj.appId,\n        cpuPct         : Number(obj.cpuPct),\n        memPct         : Number(obj.memPct),\n        sentimentScore : Number(obj.sentimentScore),\n        trendingScore  : Number(obj.trendingScore),\n        timestamp      : Number(obj.timestamp),\n      };\n\n      if (!metric.appId || Number.isNaN(metric.cpuPct)) {\n        throw new Error('Invalid metric shape');\n      }\n      return metric;\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn('[AutoScaler] Discarded malformed metric:', err);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Shutdown hook \u2013 ensures consumer disconnect & drains inflight tasks.\n   */\n  private async shutdown(): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.isShuttingDown) return;\n    this.isShuttingDown = true;\n\n    console.info('[AutoScaler] Shutting down\u2026');\n    // Additional cleanup (HTTP, etc.) could be awaited here.\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                     Module bootstrap (only when run directly)              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\nif (require.main === module) {\n  (async () => {\n    try {\n      const scaler = new SocialAwareAutoScaler();\n      await scaler.start();\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('[AutoScaler] Fatal:', err);\n      process.exitCode = 1;\n    }\n  })();\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/project/src/module_17.ts"
}

{
  "content": "/**\n * PulseSphere SocialOps\n * -------------------------------------------------------\n * Module: module_17 \u2013 Social-Aware Auto-Scaler & Alerting\n *\n * This module wires together multiple classic patterns to\n * provide a production-grade, socially-aware auto-scaling\n * component.\n *\n * Patterns in use\n *  \u2022 Observer            \u2013 MetricEventBus (EventEmitter)\n *  \u2022 Strategy            \u2013 ScalingStrategy implementations\n *  \u2022 Command             \u2013 Scale{Up,Down}Command\n *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility \u2013 AlertHandler chain (uses NotificationService)\n *  \u2022 Event Driven        \u2013 Kafka consumer feeding the bus\n *\n * External deps\n *  \u2022 kafkajs             \u2013 High-throughput metric ingestion\n *  \u2022 axios               \u2013 Mock service-mesh HTTP client\n *\n * Author:  PulseSphere SRE Platform Team\n * -------------------------------------------------------\n */\n\nimport { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { Kafka, EachMessagePayload, logLevel as KafkaLogLevel } from 'kafkajs';\nimport axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios';\nimport { notificationService, AlertMessage } from './services/notificationService';\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Static typings                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/** A single enriched metric coming from pulse-fusion pipeline. */\nexport interface EnrichedMetric {\n  readonly appId: string;\n  readonly cpuPct: number;               // 0-100\n  readonly memPct: number;               // 0-100\n  readonly sentimentScore: number;       // \u20131 .. +1\n  readonly trendingScore: number;        // 0 .. 1 (probability of virality)\n  readonly timestamp: number;            // epoch ms\n}\n\nexport enum ScalingDecision {\n  SCALE_UP   = 'SCALE_UP',\n  SCALE_DOWN = 'SCALE_DOWN',\n  STABLE     = 'STABLE',\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Observer Layer                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Central in-process event bus \u2013 translates Kafka messages into local events\n * that strategies/handlers can subscribe to without needing Kafka semantics.\n */\nclass MetricEventBus extends EventEmitter {\n  static readonly EVT_METRIC = 'metric';\n\n  emitMetric(metric: EnrichedMetric): void {\n    this.emit(MetricEventBus.EVT_METRIC, metric);\n  }\n\n  onMetric(listener: (metric: EnrichedMetric) => void): void {\n    this.on(MetricEventBus.EVT_METRIC, listener);\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                           Strategy & Command Layer                         */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/** Scaling command contract (Command Pattern). */\ninterface ScalingCommand {\n  execute(): Promise<void>;\n}\n\n/** Concrete command \u2013 scale up by N replicas. */\nclass ScaleUpCommand implements ScalingCommand {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly appId: string,\n    private readonly factor: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  public async execute(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.meshClient.scale(this.appId, this.factor);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Concrete command \u2013 scale down by N replicas. */\nclass ScaleDownCommand implements ScalingCommand {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly appId: string,\n    private readonly factor: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  public async execute(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.meshClient.scale(this.appId, -this.factor);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Strategy contract \u2013 returns a Command or undefined when no action. */\ninterface ScalingStrategy {\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined;\n}\n\n/**\n * CPU-centric strategy \u2013 reacts when usage is beyond a threshold.\n * This is a simplistic threshold-based algorithm; production code\n * would rely on predictive analytics or RL models.\n */\nclass HighCpuStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly highWaterMarkPct = 75,\n    private readonly lowWaterMarkPct  = 35,\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined {\n    if (metric.cpuPct >= this.highWaterMarkPct) {\n      const factor = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(metric.cpuPct / 25));\n      return new ScaleUpCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, factor);\n    }\n    if (metric.cpuPct <= this.lowWaterMarkPct) {\n      return new ScaleDownCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, 1);\n    }\n    return undefined;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Sentiment spike strategy \u2013 anticipates virality before infrastructure\n * gets hammered. Combines sentiment & trending scores.\n */\nclass SentimentSpikeStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly threshold = 0.85,\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined {\n    if (metric.trendingScore >= this.threshold && metric.sentimentScore > 0) {\n      // For viral events we aggressively over-provision.\n      return new ScaleUpCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, 3);\n    }\n    return undefined;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                          Chain-of-Responsibility Layer                     */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\ninterface AlertHandler {\n  setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler;\n  handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void>;\n}\n\nabstract class BaseAlertHandler implements AlertHandler {\n  private nextHandler?: AlertHandler;\n\n  public setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = handler;\n    return handler;\n  }\n\n  public async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.nextHandler) {\n      await this.nextHandler.handle(metric);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/** Debug-level handler \u2013 just noisy logs in dev environments. */\nclass DebugAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {\n      console.debug(\n        `[DEBUG] Metric \u2192 cpu:${metric.cpuPct}% mem:${metric.memPct}% ` +\n        `sentiment:${metric.sentimentScore.toFixed(2)} trending:${metric.trendingScore}`,\n      );\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Warning-level handler \u2013 triggers alert via NotificationService. */\nclass WarningAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (metric.cpuPct > 85 || metric.memPct > 85) {\n      const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n        severity: 'warning',\n        title: `High resource usage on app ${metric.appId}`,\n        details: {\n          appId: metric.appId,\n          cpuPct: metric.cpuPct,\n          memPct: metric.memPct,\n          sentimentScore: metric.sentimentScore,\n          trendingScore: metric.trendingScore,\n        },\n        sourceModule: 'module_17',\n      };\n      await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Critical handler \u2013 immediate critical alert via NotificationService. */\nclass CriticalAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    const isCrit = metric.cpuPct > 95 || metric.memPct > 95 || metric.trendingScore >= 0.95;\n    if (isCrit) {\n      const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n        severity: 'critical',\n        title: `CRITICAL: ${metric.appId} likely overloaded!`,\n        details: {\n          appId: metric.appId,\n          cpuPct: metric.cpuPct,\n          memPct: metric.memPct,\n          sentimentScore: metric.sentimentScore,\n          trendingScore: metric.trendingScore,\n        },\n        sourceModule: 'module_17',\n      };\n      await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Service-mesh client                           */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass ServiceMeshClient {\n  private readonly http: AxiosInstance;\n\n  constructor(\n    readonly baseURL: string = process.env.SERVICE_MESH_BASE_URL ?? 'http://mesh-gateway',\n    readonly timeout = 5_000,\n  ) {\n    this.http = axios.create({ baseURL: this.baseURL, timeout: this.timeout });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Scale an application up/down by \"factor\" replicas.\n   * This interacts with the platform orchestrator through\n   * the mesh sidecar.\n   */\n  public async scale(appId: string, factor: number): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      await this.http.post(`/apps/${appId}/scale`, { factor });\n      console.info(`[Scale] ${appId} scaled by ${factor}`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(`[Scale] Failed to scale ${appId}:`, err);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                            Main Orchestrator Class                         */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nexport class SocialAwareAutoScaler {\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private readonly meshClient = new ServiceMeshClient();\n  private readonly eventBus = new MetricEventBus();\n  private readonly strategies: ScalingStrategy[] = [];\n  private readonly alertChain: AlertHandler;\n  private isShuttingDown = false;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly kafkaBrokers: string[] = (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS ?? 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n    private readonly groupId = 'social-auto-scaler',\n    private readonly topic = 'pulse.metric.enriched.v1',\n  ) {\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({\n      clientId: 'pulse-auto-scaler',\n      brokers: this.kafkaBrokers,\n      logLevel: KafkaLogLevel.NOTHING,\n    });\n\n    /* Strategy registry */\n    this.strategies.push(\n      new HighCpuStrategy(this.meshClient),\n      new SentimentSpikeStrategy(this.meshClient),\n    );\n\n    /* Alert chain bootstrap */\n    const debug   = new DebugAlertHandler();\n    const warn    = new WarningAlertHandler();\n    const crit    = new CriticalAlertHandler();\n    debug.setNext(warn).setNext(crit);\n    this.alertChain = debug; // entrypoint\n\n    /* Wiring observer */\n    this.eventBus.onMetric(async (metric) => {\n      await this.alertChain.handle(metric);\n      await this.applyStrategies(metric);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize kafka consumer & begin event pump.\n   */\n  public async start(): Promise<void> {\n    const consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId: this.groupId });\n    await consumer.connect();\n    await consumer.subscribe({ topic: this.topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    console.info('[AutoScaler] started.');\n\n    await consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        if (this.isShuttingDown) {\n          await consumer.disconnect();\n          return;\n        }\n        const metric = this.parseMetric(payload);\n        if (metric) this.eventBus.emitMetric(metric);\n      },\n    });\n\n    /* Graceful shutdown binding */\n    process.once('SIGINT' , () => this.shutdown());\n    process.once('SIGTERM', () => this.shutdown());\n  }\n\n  private async applyStrategies(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    for (const strategy of this.strategies) {\n      const cmd = strategy.evaluate(metric);\n      if (cmd) {\n        try {\n          await cmd.execute();\n          break; // one strategy acted \u2013 avoid conflicting actions\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('[AutoScaler] Command failed:', err);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Converts Kafka payload into EnrichedMetric object with validation.\n   */\n  private parseMetric({ message }: EachMessagePayload): EnrichedMetric | undefined {\n    try {\n      if (!message.value) return;\n      const obj = JSON.parse(message.value.toString());\n\n      /* Lightweight validation */\n      const metric: EnrichedMetric = {\n        appId          : obj.appId,\n        cpuPct         : Number(obj.cpuPct),\n        memPct         : Number(obj.memPct),\n        sentimentScore : Number(obj.sentimentScore),\n        trendingScore  : Number(obj.trendingScore),\n        timestamp      : Number(obj.timestamp),\n      };\n\n      if (!metric.appId || Number.isNaN(metric.cpuPct)) {\n        throw new Error('Invalid metric shape');\n      }\n      return metric;\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn('[AutoScaler] Discarded malformed metric:', err);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Shutdown hook \u2013 ensures consumer disconnect & drains inflight tasks.\n   */\n  private async shutdown(): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.isShuttingDown) return;\n    this.isShuttingDown = true;\n\n    console.info('[AutoScaler] Shutting down\u2026');\n    // Additional cleanup (HTTP, etc.) could be awaited here.\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                     Module bootstrap (only when run directly)              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\nif (require.main === module) {\n  (async () => {\n    try {\n      const scaler = new SocialAwareAutoScaler();\n      await scaler.start();\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('[AutoScaler] Fatal:', err);\n      process.exitCode = 1;\n    }\n  })();\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_17.ts",
  "originalFile": "```typescript\n/**\n * PulseSphere SocialOps\n * -------------------------------------------------------\n * Module: module_17 \u2013 Social-Aware Auto-Scaler & Alerting\n *\n * This module wires together multiple classic patterns to\n * provide a production-grade, socially-aware auto-scaling\n * component.\n *\n * Patterns in use\n *  \u2022 Observer            \u2013 MetricEventBus (EventEmitter)\n *  \u2022 Strategy            \u2013 ScalingStrategy implementations\n *  \u2022 Command             \u2013 Scale{Up,Down}Command\n *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility \u2013 AlertHandler chain\n *  \u2022 Event Driven        \u2013 Kafka consumer feeding the bus\n *\n * External deps\n *  \u2022 kafkajs             \u2013 High-throughput metric ingestion\n *  \u2022 axios               \u2013 Mock service-mesh HTTP client\n *\n * Author:  PulseSphere SRE Platform Team\n * -------------------------------------------------------\n */\n\nimport { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { Kafka, EachMessagePayload, logLevel as KafkaLogLevel } from 'kafkajs';\nimport axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios';\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Static typings                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/** A single enriched metric coming from pulse-fusion pipeline. */\nexport interface EnrichedMetric {\n  readonly appId: string;\n  readonly cpuPct: number;               // 0-100\n  readonly memPct: number;               // 0-100\n  readonly sentimentScore: number;       // \u20131 .. +1\n  readonly trendingScore: number;        // 0 .. 1 (probability of virality)\n  readonly timestamp: number;            // epoch ms\n}\n\nexport enum ScalingDecision {\n  SCALE_UP   = 'SCALE_UP',\n  SCALE_DOWN = 'SCALE_DOWN',\n  STABLE     = 'STABLE',\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Observer Layer                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Central in-process event bus \u2013 translates Kafka messages into local events\n * that strategies/handlers can subscribe to without needing Kafka semantics.\n */\nclass MetricEventBus extends EventEmitter {\n  static readonly EVT_METRIC = 'metric';\n\n  emitMetric(metric: EnrichedMetric): void {\n    this.emit(MetricEventBus.EVT_METRIC, metric);\n  }\n\n  onMetric(listener: (metric: EnrichedMetric) => void): void {\n    this.on(MetricEventBus.EVT_METRIC, listener);\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                           Strategy & Command Layer                         */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/** Scaling command contract (Command Pattern). */\ninterface ScalingCommand {\n  execute(): Promise<void>;\n}\n\n/** Concrete command \u2013 scale up by N replicas. */\nclass ScaleUpCommand implements ScalingCommand {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly appId: string,\n    private readonly factor: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  public async execute(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.meshClient.scale(this.appId, this.factor);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Concrete command \u2013 scale down by N replicas. */\nclass ScaleDownCommand implements ScalingCommand {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly appId: string,\n    private readonly factor: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  public async execute(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.meshClient.scale(this.appId, -this.factor);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Strategy contract \u2013 returns a Command or undefined when no action. */\ninterface ScalingStrategy {\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined;\n}\n\n/**\n * CPU-centric strategy \u2013 reacts when usage is beyond a threshold.\n * This is a simplistic threshold-based algorithm; production code\n * would rely on predictive analytics or RL models.\n */\nclass HighCpuStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly highWaterMarkPct = 75,\n    private readonly lowWaterMarkPct  = 35,\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined {\n    if (metric.cpuPct >= this.highWaterMarkPct) {\n      const factor = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(metric.cpuPct / 25));\n      return new ScaleUpCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, factor);\n    }\n    if (metric.cpuPct <= this.lowWaterMarkPct) {\n      return new ScaleDownCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, 1);\n    }\n    return undefined;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Sentiment spike strategy \u2013 anticipates virality before infrastructure\n * gets hammered. Combines sentiment & trending scores.\n */\nclass SentimentSpikeStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly meshClient: ServiceMeshClient,\n    private readonly threshold = 0.85,\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(metric: EnrichedMetric): ScalingCommand | undefined {\n    if (metric.trendingScore >= this.threshold && metric.sentimentScore > 0) {\n      // For viral events we aggressively over-provision.\n      return new ScaleUpCommand(this.meshClient, metric.appId, 3);\n    }\n    return undefined;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                          Chain-of-Responsibility Layer                     */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\ninterface AlertHandler {\n  setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler;\n  handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void>;\n}\n\nabstract class BaseAlertHandler implements AlertHandler {\n  private nextHandler?: AlertHandler;\n\n  public setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = handler;\n    return handler;\n  }\n\n  public async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.nextHandler) {\n      await this.nextHandler.handle(metric);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/** Debug-level handler \u2013 just noisy logs in dev environments. */\nclass DebugAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {\n      console.debug(\n        `[DEBUG] Metric \u2192 cpu:${metric.cpuPct}% mem:${metric.memPct}% ` +\n        `sentiment:${metric.sentimentScore.toFixed(2)} trending:${metric.trendingScore}`,\n      );\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Warning-level handler \u2013 triggers standard alert channel. */\nclass WarningAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    if (metric.cpuPct > 85 || metric.memPct > 85) {\n      await AlertChannel.slack(\n        `\u26a0\ufe0f High resource usage on app ${metric.appId}: ` +\n        `CPU ${metric.cpuPct}% / MEM ${metric.memPct}%`,\n      );\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/** Critical handler \u2013 immediate pager-duty. */\nclass CriticalAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {\n  async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    const isCrit = metric.cpuPct > 95 || metric.memPct > 95 || metric.trendingScore >= 0.95;\n    if (isCrit) {\n      await AlertChannel.pagerDuty(\n        `\ud83d\udea8 CRITICAL: ${metric.appId} likely overloaded! ` +\n        `cpu=${metric.cpuPct}% mem=${metric.memPct}% trending=${metric.trendingScore}`,\n      );\n    }\n    await super.handle(metric);\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Service-mesh client                           */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass ServiceMeshClient {\n  private readonly http: AxiosInstance;\n\n  constructor(\n    readonly baseURL: string = process.env.SERVICE_MESH_BASE_URL ?? 'http://mesh-gateway',\n    readonly timeout = 5_000,\n  ) {\n    this.http = axios.create({ baseURL: this.baseURL, timeout: this.timeout });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Scale an application up/down by \"factor\" replicas.\n   * This interacts with the platform orchestrator through\n   * the mesh sidecar.\n   */\n  public async scale(appId: string, factor: number): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      await this.http.post(`/apps/${appId}/scale`, { factor });\n      console.info(`[Scale] ${appId} scaled by ${factor}`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(`[Scale] Failed to scale ${appId}:`, err);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Alerting helpers                              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass AlertChannel {\n  static async slack(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    // Placeholder: in production we'd push to Slack webhook\n    console.log(`[Slack] ${message}`);\n  }\n\n  static async pagerDuty(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    // Placeholder: integration key & routing will sit in vault\n    console.log(`[PagerDuty] ${message}`);\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                            Main Orchestrator Class                         */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nexport class SocialAwareAutoScaler {\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private readonly meshClient = new ServiceMeshClient();\n  private readonly eventBus = new MetricEventBus();\n  private readonly strategies: ScalingStrategy[] = [];\n  private readonly alertChain: AlertHandler;\n  private isShuttingDown = false;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly kafkaBrokers: string[] = (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS ?? 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n    private readonly groupId = 'social-auto-scaler',\n    private readonly topic = 'pulse.metric.enriched.v1',\n  ) {\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({\n      clientId: 'pulse-auto-scaler',\n      brokers: this.kafkaBrokers,\n      logLevel: KafkaLogLevel.NOTHING,\n    });\n\n    /* Strategy registry */\n    this.strategies.push(\n      new HighCpuStrategy(this.meshClient),\n      new SentimentSpikeStrategy(this.meshClient),\n    );\n\n    /* Alert chain bootstrap */\n    const debug   = new DebugAlertHandler();\n    const warn    = new WarningAlertHandler();\n    const crit    = new CriticalAlertHandler();\n    debug.setNext(warn).setNext(crit);\n    this.alertChain = debug; // entrypoint\n\n    /* Wiring observer */\n    this.eventBus.onMetric(async (metric) => {\n      await this.alertChain.handle(metric);\n      await this.applyStrategies(metric);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize kafka consumer & begin event pump.\n   */\n  public async start(): Promise<void> {\n    const consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId: this.groupId });\n    await consumer.connect();\n    await consumer.subscribe({ topic: this.topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    console.info('[AutoScaler] started.');\n\n    await consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        if (this.isShuttingDown) {\n          await consumer.disconnect();\n          return;\n        }\n        const metric = this.parseMetric(payload);\n        if (metric) this.eventBus.emitMetric(metric);\n      },\n    });\n\n    /* Graceful shutdown binding */\n    process.once('SIGINT' , () => this.shutdown());\n    process.once('SIGTERM', () => this.shutdown());\n  }\n\n  private async applyStrategies(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {\n    for (const strategy of this.strategies) {\n      const cmd = strategy.evaluate(metric);\n      if (cmd) {\n        try {\n          await cmd.execute();\n          break; // one strategy acted \u2013 avoid conflicting actions\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('[AutoScaler] Command failed:', err);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Converts Kafka payload into EnrichedMetric object with validation.\n   */\n  private parseMetric({ message }: EachMessagePayload): EnrichedMetric | undefined {\n    try {\n      if (!message.value) return;\n      const obj = JSON.parse(message.value.toString());\n\n      /* Lightweight validation */\n      const metric: EnrichedMetric = {\n        appId          : obj.appId,\n        cpuPct         : Number(obj.cpuPct),\n        memPct         : Number(obj.memPct),\n        sentimentScore : Number(obj.sentimentScore),\n        trendingScore  : Number(obj.trendingScore),\n        timestamp      : Number(obj.timestamp),\n      };\n\n      if (!metric.appId || Number.isNaN(metric.cpuPct)) {\n        throw new Error('Invalid metric shape');\n      }\n      return metric;\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn('[AutoScaler] Discarded malformed metric:', err);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Shutdown hook \u2013 ensures consumer disconnect & drains inflight tasks.\n   */\n  private async shutdown(): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.isShuttingDown) return;\n    this.isShuttingDown = true;\n\n    console.info('[AutoScaler] Shutting down\u2026');\n    // Additional cleanup (HTTP, etc.) could be awaited here.\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                     Module bootstrap (only when run directly)              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\nif (require.main === module) {\n  (async () => {\n    try {\n      const scaler = new SocialAwareAutoScaler();\n      await scaler.start();\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('[AutoScaler] Fatal:', err);\n      process.exitCode = 1;\n    }\n  })();\n}\n```",

    {
      "lines": [

      "lines": [

        "- *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility \u2013 AlertHandler chain",
        "+ *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility \u2013 AlertHandler chain (uses NotificationService)",

      "lines": [
        " import { EventEmitter } from 'events';",
        " import { Kafka, EachMessagePayload, logLevel as KafkaLogLevel } from 'kafkajs';",
        " import axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios';",
        "+import { notificationService, AlertMessage } from './services/notificationService';",
        " ",
        " /* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */",
        " /*                               Static typings                               */"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 25,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 26
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "   }",
        " }",

        "-/** Warning-level handler \u2013 triggers standard alert channel. */",
        "+/** Warning-level handler \u2013 triggers alert via NotificationService. */",
        " class WarningAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {",
        "   async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {",
        "     if (metric.cpuPct > 85 || metric.memPct > 85) {",
        "-      await AlertChannel.slack(",
        "-        `\u26a0\ufe0f High resource usage on app ${metric.appId}: ` +",
        "-        `CPU ${metric.cpuPct}% / MEM ${metric.memPct}%`,",
        "-      );",
        "+      const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {",
        "+        severity: 'warning',",
        "+        title: `High resource usage on app ${metric.appId}`,",
        "+        details: {",
        "+          appId: metric.appId,",
        "+          cpuPct: metric.cpuPct,",
        "+          memPct: metric.memPct,",

        "+        sourceModule: 'module_17',",
        "+      };",
        "+      await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);",
        "     }",
        "     await super.handle(metric);",
        "   }",
        " }",
        " ",
        "-/** Critical handler \u2013 immediate pager-duty. */",
        "+/** Critical handler \u2013 immediate critical alert via NotificationService. */",
        " class CriticalAlertHandler extends BaseAlertHandler {",
        "   async handle(metric: EnrichedMetric): Promise<void> {",
        "     const isCrit = metric.cpuPct > 95 || metric.memPct > 95 || metric.trendingScore >= 0.95;",
        "     if (isCrit) {",
        "-      await AlertChannel.pagerDuty(",
        "-        `\ud83d\udea8 CRITICAL: ${metric.appId} likely overloaded! ` +",
        "-        `cpu=${metric.cpuPct}% mem=${metric.memPct}% trending=${metric.trendingScore}`,",
        "-      );",
        "+      const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {",
        "+        severity: 'critical',",
        "+        title: `CRITICAL: ${metric.appId} likely overloaded!`,",
        "+        details: {",
        "+          appId: metric.appId,",
        "+          cpuPct: metric.cpuPct,",
        "+          memPct: metric.memPct,",
        "+          sentimentScore: metric.sentimentScore,",
        "+          trendingScore: metric.trendingScore,",
        "+        },",
        "+        sourceModule: 'module_17',",
        "+      };",
        "+      await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);",
        "     }",
        "     await super.handle(metric);",
        "   }"
      ],
      "newLines": 46,
      "newStart": 187,
      "oldLines": 28,
      "oldStart": 187
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        " }",
        " ",
        " /* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */",
        "-/*                              Alerting helpers                              */",
        "-/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */",
        "-",
        "-class AlertChannel {",
        "-  static async slack(message: string): Promise<void> {",
        "-    // Placeholder: in production we'd push to Slack webhook",
        "-    console.log(`[Slack] ${message}`);",
        "-  }",
        "-",
        "-  static async pagerDuty(message: string): Promise<void> {",
        "-    // Placeholder: integration key & routing will sit in vault",
        "-    console.log(`[PagerDuty] ${message}`);",
        "-  }",
        "-}",
        "-",
        "-/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */",
        " /*                            Main Orchestrator Class                         */",

56. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/project/src/module_33.ts"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```typescript\n/******************************************************************************************\n *  File:        src/module_33.ts\n *  Project:     PulseSphere SocialOps (system_monitoring)\n *\n *  Description:\n *  Social-Aware Auto-Scaler micro-service. Listens to infrastructure telemetry (CPU/memory)\n *  from Apache Kafka, listens to near-real-time social-interaction signals from NATS,\n *  merges the two streams and decides\u2014via configurable Strategy pattern\u2014whether capacity\n *  should be scaled up/down. If a scaling decision is made it emits a Command event back\n *  to the message bus. Additionally, it forwards critical alerts through a simple\n *  Chain-of-Responsibility notifier pipeline (Slack \u2192 PagerDuty \u2192 Log).\n *\n *  NOTE: 3rd-party SDKs are thinly wrapped to allow mocking in unit tests; production\n *  credentials and topics/subjects are injected via env-vars or Secret-Manager.\n ******************************************************************************************/\n\n/* ================================== Imports ========================================= */\n\nimport { Kafka, Producer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport { connect as natsConnect, NatsConnection, Subscription, JSONCodec } from 'nats';\nimport pino, { Logger } from 'pino';\nimport { v4 as uuid } from 'uuid';\n\n/* ============================== Domain & Contracts ================================== */\n\n/**\n * Represents infrastructure telemetry pulled from Prometheus-push gateway (simplified).\n */\nexport interface SystemMetric {\n  timestamp: number;              // unix epoch ms\n  instanceId: string;             // k8s node or pod id\n  cpuLoadPct: number;             // e.g., 0.73 means 73%\n  memoryLoadPct: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * Represents social-interaction spikes (likes, comments, shares, etc.)\n */\nexport interface SocialSignal {\n  timestamp: number;\n  campaignId?: string;\n  hashtag?: string;\n  deltaPerSecond: number;         // increase of interactions per sec\n}\n\n/**\n * Consolidated view that Strategies will look at.\n */\nexport interface CombinedMetrics {\n  system: SystemMetric;\n  social?: SocialSignal;\n}\n\n/**\n * Command event that goes onto Kafka for Orchestration service.\n */\nexport interface ScalingCommand {\n  commandId: string;\n  issuedAt: number;\n  targetGroup: string;            // e.g., \"video-processor-pods\"\n  action: 'SCALE_UP' | 'SCALE_DOWN';\n  desiredReplicas: number;\n  reason: string;\n}\n\n/* =========================== Strategy Pattern ======================================= */\n\nexport interface ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name: string;\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null;\n}\n\n/**\n * 1. Pure CPU strategy\u2014scale if CPU surpasses threshold.\n */\nexport class CpuLoadStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'CpuLoadStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly cpuUpperThreshold = 0.8,\n    private readonly cpuLowerThreshold = 0.25,\n    private readonly maxReplicas = 16,\n    private readonly minReplicas = 2\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    const { cpuLoadPct, instanceId } = input.system;\n    let action: ScalingCommand['action'] | null = null;\n    let desired: number | null = null;\n\n    if (cpuLoadPct >= this.cpuUpperThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_UP';\n      desired = Math.min(this.maxReplicas, Math.ceil(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    } else if (cpuLoadPct <= this.cpuLowerThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_DOWN';\n      desired = Math.max(this.minReplicas, Math.floor(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    }\n\n    if (action && desired !== null) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: instanceId,\n        action,\n        desiredReplicas: desired,\n        reason: `CPU load ${cpuLoadPct * 100}% triggered ${action}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 2. Social trend strategy\u2014scale on viral spikes regardless of current CPU.\n */\nexport class SocialTrendingStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'SocialTrendingStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly spikeThreshold = 5000,        // interactions/sec\n    private readonly surgeReplicas = 8\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    if (!input.social) return null;\n    const { deltaPerSecond, hashtag } = input.social;\n    if (deltaPerSecond >= this.spikeThreshold) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: hashtag ?? 'global',\n        action: 'SCALE_UP',\n        desiredReplicas: this.surgeReplicas,\n        reason: `Social spike (${deltaPerSecond}/s) for #${hashtag}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 3. Hybrid strategy\u2014showcases Strategy composition.\n */\nexport class HybridStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'HybridStrategy';\n  private readonly innerStrategies: ScalingStrategy[];\n\n  constructor(...strategies: ScalingStrategy[]) {\n    this.innerStrategies = strategies;\n  }\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    for (const strat of this.innerStrategies) {\n      const cmd = strat.evaluate(input);\n      if (cmd) return cmd;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/* =================== Chain-of-Responsibility for Alerting =========================== */\n\ninterface AlertHandler {\n  setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler;\n  handle(message: string): Promise<void>;\n}\n\nabstract class AbstractHandler implements AlertHandler {\n  protected nextHandler?: AlertHandler;\n  setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = handler;\n    return handler;\n  }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.nextHandler) {\n      await this.nextHandler.handle(message);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass SlackNotifierHandler extends AbstractHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly logger: Logger) { super(); }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      // Placeholder for Slack webhook call\n      this.logger.info({ msg: 'SlackNotifier', message });\n      // Success, stop chain.\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.error({ err, msg: 'SlackNotifierFailed' });\n      await super.handle(message);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass PagerDutyHandler extends AbstractHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly logger: Logger) { super(); }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      // Placeholder for PagerDuty event trigger\n      this.logger.info({ msg: 'PagerDutyNotifier', message });\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.error({ err, msg: 'PagerDutyNotifierFailed' });\n      await super.handle(message);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass FallbackLoggerHandler extends AbstractHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly logger: Logger) { super(); }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    this.logger.warn({ msg: 'FallbackLogger', message });\n    await super.handle(message);\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================ Auto-Scaler Service =================================== */\n\nexport class SocialAwareAutoScaler {\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private readonly kafkaProducer: Producer;\n  private readonly natsConn: NatsConnection;\n  private readonly jc = JSONCodec();\n\n  private readonly logger: Logger;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n\n  private slackHandler: AlertHandler;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly kafkaBrokers: string[],\n    private readonly natsUrl: string,\n    strategy?: ScalingStrategy\n  ) {\n    this.logger = pino({ name: 'SocialAwareAutoScaler' });\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({ clientId: 'auto-scaler', brokers: kafkaBrokers });\n    this.kafkaProducer = this.kafka.producer();\n    this.strategy = strategy ?? new HybridStrategy(\n      new SocialTrendingStrategy(),\n      new CpuLoadStrategy()\n    );\n    this.natsConn = {} as any; // will connect later\n\n    // Alert pipeline\n    this.slackHandler = new SlackNotifierHandler(this.logger);\n    this.slackHandler\n      .setNext(new PagerDutyHandler(this.logger))\n      .setNext(new FallbackLoggerHandler(this.logger));\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Bootstrapping ---------- */\n\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      await this.kafkaProducer.connect();\n      this.logger.info('Kafka producer connected');\n\n      // Connect to NATS\n      this.natsConn = await natsConnect({ servers: this.natsUrl });\n      this.logger.info('NATS connected');\n\n      // Subscribe to streams\n      await this.subscribeSystemMetrics();\n      await this.subscribeSocialSignals();\n\n      this.logger.info(`Auto-Scaler started with strategy ${this.strategy.name}`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.fatal({ err }, 'Failed to start Auto-Scaler');\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async shutdown(): Promise<void> {\n    await Promise.allSettled([this.kafkaProducer.disconnect(), this.natsConn.close()]);\n    this.logger.info('Graceful shutdown complete.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Internal Subscription Logic ---------- */\n\n  private async subscribeSystemMetrics(): Promise<void> {\n    const consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId: 'auto-scaler-group' });\n    await consumer.connect();\n    await consumer.subscribe({ topic: 'telemetry.system', fromBeginning: false });\n\n    consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        try {\n          const metric: SystemMetric = JSON.parse(payload.message.value!.toString());\n\n          // Merge with any cached social signal if available\n          const combined: CombinedMetrics = { system: metric, social: this.lastSocialSignal };\n\n          await this.maybeScale(combined);\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle system metric message');\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  private lastSocialSignal?: SocialSignal;\n  private async subscribeSocialSignals(): Promise<void> {\n    const sub: Subscription = this.natsConn.subscribe('social.trending');\n    (async () => {\n      for await (const msg of sub) {\n        try {\n          const signal: SocialSignal = this.jc.decode(msg.data);\n          this.lastSocialSignal = signal; // simple cache\n          const dummySystem: SystemMetric = {\n            timestamp: signal.timestamp,\n            instanceId: 'social-only',\n            cpuLoadPct: 0,\n            memoryLoadPct: 0\n          };\n          await this.maybeScale({ system: dummySystem, social: signal });\n\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle social signal message');\n        }\n      }\n    })().catch(err => this.logger.error({ err }, 'NATS subscription failed'));\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Core Decision Loop ---------- */\n\n  private async maybeScale(input: CombinedMetrics): Promise<void> {\n    const cmd = this.strategy.evaluate(input);\n    if (cmd) {\n      this.logger.info({ cmd }, 'Scaling decision issued');\n\n      try {\n        await this.kafkaProducer.send({\n          topic: 'orchestration.scaling.command',\n          messages: [{ key: cmd.targetGroup, value: JSON.stringify(cmd) }]\n        });\n      } catch (err) {\n        this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to publish scaling command');\n        await this.slackHandler.handle(`Scaling command failed: ${err}`);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================= Run if main ========================================== */\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  const scaler = new SocialAwareAutoScaler(\n    process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS?.split(',') ?? ['localhost:9092'],\n    process.env.NATS_URL ?? 'nats://127.0.0.1:4222'\n  );\n\n  scaler.start();\n\n  // Graceful shutdown\n  process.on('SIGINT', async () => {\n    await scaler.shutdown();\n    process.exit(0);\n  });\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_33.ts",
    "numLines": 360,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 360
  },
  "type": "text"
}
