Input
{
  "content": "/******************************************************************************************\n *  File:        src/module_33.ts\n *  Project:     PulseSphere SocialOps (system_monitoring)\n *\n *  Description:\n *  Social-Aware Auto-Scaler micro-service. Listens to infrastructure telemetry (CPU/memory)\n *  from Apache Kafka, listens to near-real-time social-interaction signals from NATS,\n *  merges the two streams and decides\u2014via configurable Strategy pattern\u2014whether capacity\n *  should be scaled up/down. If a scaling decision is made it emits a Command event back\n *  to the message bus. Additionally, it forwards critical alerts through the centralized\n *  NotificationService.\n *\n *  NOTE: 3rd-party SDKs are thinly wrapped to allow mocking in unit tests; production\n *  credentials and topics/subjects are injected via env-vars or Secret-Manager.\n ******************************************************************************************/\n\n/* ================================== Imports ========================================= */\n\nimport { Kafka, Producer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport { connect as natsConnect, NatsConnection, Subscription, JSONCodec } from 'nats';\nimport pino, { Logger } from 'pino';\nimport { v4 as uuid } from 'uuid';\nimport { notificationService, AlertMessage } from './services/notificationService';\n\n/* ============================== Domain & Contracts ================================== */\n\n/**\n * Represents infrastructure telemetry pulled from Prometheus-push gateway (simplified).\n */\nexport interface SystemMetric {\n  timestamp: number;              // unix epoch ms\n  instanceId: string;             // k8s node or pod id\n  cpuLoadPct: number;             // e.g., 0.73 means 73%\n  memoryLoadPct: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * Represents social-interaction spikes (likes, comments, shares, etc.)\n */\nexport interface SocialSignal {\n  timestamp: number;\n  campaignId?: string;\n  hashtag?: string;\n  deltaPerSecond: number;         // increase of interactions per sec\n}\n\n/**\n * Consolidated view that Strategies will look at.\n */\nexport interface CombinedMetrics {\n  system: SystemMetric;\n  social?: SocialSignal;\n}\n\n/**\n * Command event that goes onto Kafka for Orchestration service.\n */\nexport interface ScalingCommand {\n  commandId: string;\n  issuedAt: number;\n  targetGroup: string;            // e.g., \"video-processor-pods\"\n  action: 'SCALE_UP' | 'SCALE_DOWN';\n  desiredReplicas: number;\n  reason: string;\n}\n\n/* =========================== Strategy Pattern ======================================= */\n\nexport interface ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name: string;\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null;\n}\n\n/**\n * 1. Pure CPU strategy\u2014scale if CPU surpasses threshold.\n */\nexport class CpuLoadStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'CpuLoadStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly cpuUpperThreshold = 0.8,\n    private readonly cpuLowerThreshold = 0.25,\n    private readonly maxReplicas = 16,\n    private readonly minReplicas = 2\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    const { cpuLoadPct, instanceId } = input.system;\n    let action: ScalingCommand['action'] | null = null;\n    let desired: number | null = null;\n\n    if (cpuLoadPct >= this.cpuUpperThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_UP';\n      desired = Math.min(this.maxReplicas, Math.ceil(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    } else if (cpuLoadPct <= this.cpuLowerThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_DOWN';\n      desired = Math.max(this.minReplicas, Math.floor(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    }\n\n    if (action && desired !== null) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: instanceId,\n        action,\n        desiredReplicas: desired,\n        reason: `CPU load ${cpuLoadPct * 100}% triggered ${action}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 2. Social trend strategy\u2014scale on viral spikes regardless of current CPU.\n */\nexport class SocialTrendingStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'SocialTrendingStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly spikeThreshold = 5000,        // interactions/sec\n    private readonly surgeReplicas = 8\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    if (!input.social) return null;\n    const { deltaPerSecond, hashtag } = input.social;\n    if (deltaPerSecond >= this.spikeThreshold) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: hashtag ?? 'global',\n        action: 'SCALE_UP',\n        desiredReplicas: this.surgeReplicas,\n        reason: `Social spike (${deltaPerSecond}/s) for #${hashtag}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 3. Hybrid strategy\u2014showcases Strategy composition.\n */\nexport class HybridStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'HybridStrategy';\n  private readonly innerStrategies: ScalingStrategy[];\n\n  constructor(...strategies: ScalingStrategy[]) {\n    this.innerStrategies = strategies;\n  }\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    for (const strat of this.innerStrategies) {\n      const cmd = strat.evaluate(input);\n      if (cmd) return cmd;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================ Auto-Scaler Service =================================== */\n\nexport class SocialAwareAutoScaler {\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private readonly kafkaProducer: Producer;\n  private readonly natsConn: NatsConnection;\n  private readonly jc = JSONCodec();\n\n  private readonly logger: Logger;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly kafkaBrokers: string[],\n    private readonly natsUrl: string,\n    strategy?: ScalingStrategy\n  ) {\n    this.logger = pino({ name: 'SocialAwareAutoScaler' });\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({ clientId: 'auto-scaler', brokers: kafkaBrokers });\n    this.kafkaProducer = this.kafka.producer();\n    this.strategy = strategy ?? new HybridStrategy(\n      new SocialTrendingStrategy(),\n      new CpuLoadStrategy()\n    );\n    this.natsConn = {} as any; // will connect later\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Bootstrapping ---------- */\n\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      await this.kafkaProducer.connect();\n      this.logger.info('Kafka producer connected');\n\n      // Connect to NATS\n      this.natsConn = await natsConnect({ servers: this.natsUrl });\n      this.logger.info('NATS connected');\n\n      // Subscribe to streams\n      await this.subscribeSystemMetrics();\n      await this.subscribeSocialSignals();\n\n      this.logger.info(`Auto-Scaler started with strategy ${this.strategy.name}`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.fatal({ err }, 'Failed to start Auto-Scaler');\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async shutdown(): Promise<void> {\n    await Promise.allSettled([this.kafkaProducer.disconnect(), this.natsConn.close()]);\n    this.logger.info('Graceful shutdown complete.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Internal Subscription Logic ---------- */\n\n  private async subscribeSystemMetrics(): Promise<void> {\n    const consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId: 'auto-scaler-group' });\n    await consumer.connect();\n    await consumer.subscribe({ topic: 'telemetry.system', fromBeginning: false });\n\n    consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        try {\n          const metric: SystemMetric = JSON.parse(payload.message.value!.toString());\n\n          // Merge with any cached social signal if available\n          const combined: CombinedMetrics = { system: metric, social: this.lastSocialSignal };\n\n          await this.maybeScale(combined);\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle system metric message');\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  private lastSocialSignal?: SocialSignal;\n  private async subscribeSocialSignals(): Promise<void> {\n    const sub: Subscription = this.natsConn.subscribe('social.trending');\n    (async () => {\n      for await (const msg of sub) {\n        try {\n          const signal: SocialSignal = this.jc.decode(msg.data);\n          this.lastSocialSignal = signal; // simple cache\n          const dummySystem: SystemMetric = {\n            timestamp: signal.timestamp,\n            instanceId: 'social-only',\n            cpuLoadPct: 0,\n            memoryLoadPct: 0\n          };\n          await this.maybeScale({ system: dummySystem, social: signal });\n\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle social signal message');\n        }\n      }\n    })().catch(err => this.logger.error({ err }, 'NATS subscription failed'));\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Core Decision Loop ---------- */\n\n  private async maybeScale(input: CombinedMetrics): Promise<void> {\n    const cmd = this.strategy.evaluate(input);\n    if (cmd) {\n      this.logger.info({ cmd }, 'Scaling decision issued');\n\n      try {\n        await this.kafkaProducer.send({\n          topic: 'orchestration.scaling.command',\n          messages: [{ key: cmd.targetGroup, value: JSON.stringify(cmd) }]\n        });\n      } catch (err) {\n        this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to publish scaling command');\n        // Dispatch alert via NotificationService\n        const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n          severity: 'warning',\n          title: 'Scaling command failed',\n          details: {\n            error: String(err),\n            command: cmd,\n          },\n          sourceModule: 'module_33',\n        };\n        await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================= Run if main ========================================== */\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  const scaler = new SocialAwareAutoScaler(\n    process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS?.split(',') ?? ['localhost:9092'],\n    process.env.NATS_URL ?? 'nats://127.0.0.1:4222'\n  );\n\n  scaler.start();\n\n  // Graceful shutdown\n  process.on('SIGINT', async () => {\n    await scaler.shutdown();\n    process.exit(0);\n  });\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/project/src/module_33.ts"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/******************************************************************************************\n *  File:        src/module_33.ts\n *  Project:     PulseSphere SocialOps (system_monitoring)\n *\n *  Description:\n *  Social-Aware Auto-Scaler micro-service. Listens to infrastructure telemetry (CPU/memory)\n *  from Apache Kafka, listens to near-real-time social-interaction signals from NATS,\n *  merges the two streams and decides\u2014via configurable Strategy pattern\u2014whether capacity\n *  should be scaled up/down. If a scaling decision is made it emits a Command event back\n *  to the message bus. Additionally, it forwards critical alerts through the centralized\n *  NotificationService.\n *\n *  NOTE: 3rd-party SDKs are thinly wrapped to allow mocking in unit tests; production\n *  credentials and topics/subjects are injected via env-vars or Secret-Manager.\n ******************************************************************************************/\n\n/* ================================== Imports ========================================= */\n\nimport { Kafka, Producer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport { connect as natsConnect, NatsConnection, Subscription, JSONCodec } from 'nats';\nimport pino, { Logger } from 'pino';\nimport { v4 as uuid } from 'uuid';\nimport { notificationService, AlertMessage } from './services/notificationService';\n\n/* ============================== Domain & Contracts ================================== */\n\n/**\n * Represents infrastructure telemetry pulled from Prometheus-push gateway (simplified).\n */\nexport interface SystemMetric {\n  timestamp: number;              // unix epoch ms\n  instanceId: string;             // k8s node or pod id\n  cpuLoadPct: number;             // e.g., 0.73 means 73%\n  memoryLoadPct: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * Represents social-interaction spikes (likes, comments, shares, etc.)\n */\nexport interface SocialSignal {\n  timestamp: number;\n  campaignId?: string;\n  hashtag?: string;\n  deltaPerSecond: number;         // increase of interactions per sec\n}\n\n/**\n * Consolidated view that Strategies will look at.\n */\nexport interface CombinedMetrics {\n  system: SystemMetric;\n  social?: SocialSignal;\n}\n\n/**\n * Command event that goes onto Kafka for Orchestration service.\n */\nexport interface ScalingCommand {\n  commandId: string;\n  issuedAt: number;\n  targetGroup: string;            // e.g., \"video-processor-pods\"\n  action: 'SCALE_UP' | 'SCALE_DOWN';\n  desiredReplicas: number;\n  reason: string;\n}\n\n/* =========================== Strategy Pattern ======================================= */\n\nexport interface ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name: string;\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null;\n}\n\n/**\n * 1. Pure CPU strategy\u2014scale if CPU surpasses threshold.\n */\nexport class CpuLoadStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'CpuLoadStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly cpuUpperThreshold = 0.8,\n    private readonly cpuLowerThreshold = 0.25,\n    private readonly maxReplicas = 16,\n    private readonly minReplicas = 2\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    const { cpuLoadPct, instanceId } = input.system;\n    let action: ScalingCommand['action'] | null = null;\n    let desired: number | null = null;\n\n    if (cpuLoadPct >= this.cpuUpperThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_UP';\n      desired = Math.min(this.maxReplicas, Math.ceil(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    } else if (cpuLoadPct <= this.cpuLowerThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_DOWN';\n      desired = Math.max(this.minReplicas, Math.floor(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    }\n\n    if (action && desired !== null) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: instanceId,\n        action,\n        desiredReplicas: desired,\n        reason: `CPU load ${cpuLoadPct * 100}% triggered ${action}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 2. Social trend strategy\u2014scale on viral spikes regardless of current CPU.\n */\nexport class SocialTrendingStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'SocialTrendingStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly spikeThreshold = 5000,        // interactions/sec\n    private readonly surgeReplicas = 8\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    if (!input.social) return null;\n    const { deltaPerSecond, hashtag } = input.social;\n    if (deltaPerSecond >= this.spikeThreshold) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: hashtag ?? 'global',\n        action: 'SCALE_UP',\n        desiredReplicas: this.surgeReplicas,\n        reason: `Social spike (${deltaPerSecond}/s) for #${hashtag}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 3. Hybrid strategy\u2014showcases Strategy composition.\n */\nexport class HybridStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'HybridStrategy';\n  private readonly innerStrategies: ScalingStrategy[];\n\n  constructor(...strategies: ScalingStrategy[]) {\n    this.innerStrategies = strategies;\n  }\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    for (const strat of this.innerStrategies) {\n      const cmd = strat.evaluate(input);\n      if (cmd) return cmd;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================ Auto-Scaler Service =================================== */\n\nexport class SocialAwareAutoScaler {\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private readonly kafkaProducer: Producer;\n  private readonly natsConn: NatsConnection;\n  private readonly jc = JSONCodec();\n\n  private readonly logger: Logger;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly kafkaBrokers: string[],\n    private readonly natsUrl: string,\n    strategy?: ScalingStrategy\n  ) {\n    this.logger = pino({ name: 'SocialAwareAutoScaler' });\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({ clientId: 'auto-scaler', brokers: kafkaBrokers });\n    this.kafkaProducer = this.kafka.producer();\n    this.strategy = strategy ?? new HybridStrategy(\n      new SocialTrendingStrategy(),\n      new CpuLoadStrategy()\n    );\n    this.natsConn = {} as any; // will connect later\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Bootstrapping ---------- */\n\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      await this.kafkaProducer.connect();\n      this.logger.info('Kafka producer connected');\n\n      // Connect to NATS\n      this.natsConn = await natsConnect({ servers: this.natsUrl });\n      this.logger.info('NATS connected');\n\n      // Subscribe to streams\n      await this.subscribeSystemMetrics();\n      await this.subscribeSocialSignals();\n\n      this.logger.info(`Auto-Scaler started with strategy ${this.strategy.name}`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.fatal({ err }, 'Failed to start Auto-Scaler');\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async shutdown(): Promise<void> {\n    await Promise.allSettled([this.kafkaProducer.disconnect(), this.natsConn.close()]);\n    this.logger.info('Graceful shutdown complete.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Internal Subscription Logic ---------- */\n\n  private async subscribeSystemMetrics(): Promise<void> {\n    const consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId: 'auto-scaler-group' });\n    await consumer.connect();\n    await consumer.subscribe({ topic: 'telemetry.system', fromBeginning: false });\n\n    consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        try {\n          const metric: SystemMetric = JSON.parse(payload.message.value!.toString());\n\n          // Merge with any cached social signal if available\n          const combined: CombinedMetrics = { system: metric, social: this.lastSocialSignal };\n\n          await this.maybeScale(combined);\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle system metric message');\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  private lastSocialSignal?: SocialSignal;\n  private async subscribeSocialSignals(): Promise<void> {\n    const sub: Subscription = this.natsConn.subscribe('social.trending');\n    (async () => {\n      for await (const msg of sub) {\n        try {\n          const signal: SocialSignal = this.jc.decode(msg.data);\n          this.lastSocialSignal = signal; // simple cache\n          const dummySystem: SystemMetric = {\n            timestamp: signal.timestamp,\n            instanceId: 'social-only',\n            cpuLoadPct: 0,\n            memoryLoadPct: 0\n          };\n          await this.maybeScale({ system: dummySystem, social: signal });\n\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle social signal message');\n        }\n      }\n    })().catch(err => this.logger.error({ err }, 'NATS subscription failed'));\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Core Decision Loop ---------- */\n\n  private async maybeScale(input: CombinedMetrics): Promise<void> {\n    const cmd = this.strategy.evaluate(input);\n    if (cmd) {\n      this.logger.info({ cmd }, 'Scaling decision issued');\n\n      try {\n        await this.kafkaProducer.send({\n          topic: 'orchestration.scaling.command',\n          messages: [{ key: cmd.targetGroup, value: JSON.stringify(cmd) }]\n        });\n      } catch (err) {\n        this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to publish scaling command');\n        // Dispatch alert via NotificationService\n        const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n          severity: 'warning',\n          title: 'Scaling command failed',\n          details: {\n            error: String(err),\n            command: cmd,\n          },\n          sourceModule: 'module_33',\n        };\n        await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================= Run if main ========================================== */\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  const scaler = new SocialAwareAutoScaler(\n    process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS?.split(',') ?? ['localhost:9092'],\n    process.env.NATS_URL ?? 'nats://127.0.0.1:4222'\n  );\n\n  scaler.start();\n\n  // Graceful shutdown\n  process.on('SIGINT', async () => {\n    await scaler.shutdown();\n    process.exit(0);\n  });\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_33.ts",
  "originalFile": "```typescript\n/******************************************************************************************\n *  File:        src/module_33.ts\n *  Project:     PulseSphere SocialOps (system_monitoring)\n *\n *  Description:\n *  Social-Aware Auto-Scaler micro-service. Listens to infrastructure telemetry (CPU/memory)\n *  from Apache Kafka, listens to near-real-time social-interaction signals from NATS,\n *  merges the two streams and decides\u2014via configurable Strategy pattern\u2014whether capacity\n *  should be scaled up/down. If a scaling decision is made it emits a Command event back\n *  to the message bus. Additionally, it forwards critical alerts through a simple\n *  Chain-of-Responsibility notifier pipeline (Slack \u2192 PagerDuty \u2192 Log).\n *\n *  NOTE: 3rd-party SDKs are thinly wrapped to allow mocking in unit tests; production\n *  credentials and topics/subjects are injected via env-vars or Secret-Manager.\n ******************************************************************************************/\n\n/* ================================== Imports ========================================= */\n\nimport { Kafka, Producer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport { connect as natsConnect, NatsConnection, Subscription, JSONCodec } from 'nats';\nimport pino, { Logger } from 'pino';\nimport { v4 as uuid } from 'uuid';\n\n/* ============================== Domain & Contracts ================================== */\n\n/**\n * Represents infrastructure telemetry pulled from Prometheus-push gateway (simplified).\n */\nexport interface SystemMetric {\n  timestamp: number;              // unix epoch ms\n  instanceId: string;             // k8s node or pod id\n  cpuLoadPct: number;             // e.g., 0.73 means 73%\n  memoryLoadPct: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * Represents social-interaction spikes (likes, comments, shares, etc.)\n */\nexport interface SocialSignal {\n  timestamp: number;\n  campaignId?: string;\n  hashtag?: string;\n  deltaPerSecond: number;         // increase of interactions per sec\n}\n\n/**\n * Consolidated view that Strategies will look at.\n */\nexport interface CombinedMetrics {\n  system: SystemMetric;\n  social?: SocialSignal;\n}\n\n/**\n * Command event that goes onto Kafka for Orchestration service.\n */\nexport interface ScalingCommand {\n  commandId: string;\n  issuedAt: number;\n  targetGroup: string;            // e.g., \"video-processor-pods\"\n  action: 'SCALE_UP' | 'SCALE_DOWN';\n  desiredReplicas: number;\n  reason: string;\n}\n\n/* =========================== Strategy Pattern ======================================= */\n\nexport interface ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name: string;\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null;\n}\n\n/**\n * 1. Pure CPU strategy\u2014scale if CPU surpasses threshold.\n */\nexport class CpuLoadStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'CpuLoadStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly cpuUpperThreshold = 0.8,\n    private readonly cpuLowerThreshold = 0.25,\n    private readonly maxReplicas = 16,\n    private readonly minReplicas = 2\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    const { cpuLoadPct, instanceId } = input.system;\n    let action: ScalingCommand['action'] | null = null;\n    let desired: number | null = null;\n\n    if (cpuLoadPct >= this.cpuUpperThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_UP';\n      desired = Math.min(this.maxReplicas, Math.ceil(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    } else if (cpuLoadPct <= this.cpuLowerThreshold) {\n      action = 'SCALE_DOWN';\n      desired = Math.max(this.minReplicas, Math.floor(cpuLoadPct * 10));\n    }\n\n    if (action && desired !== null) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: instanceId,\n        action,\n        desiredReplicas: desired,\n        reason: `CPU load ${cpuLoadPct * 100}% triggered ${action}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 2. Social trend strategy\u2014scale on viral spikes regardless of current CPU.\n */\nexport class SocialTrendingStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'SocialTrendingStrategy';\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly spikeThreshold = 5000,        // interactions/sec\n    private readonly surgeReplicas = 8\n  ) {}\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    if (!input.social) return null;\n    const { deltaPerSecond, hashtag } = input.social;\n    if (deltaPerSecond >= this.spikeThreshold) {\n      return {\n        commandId: uuid(),\n        issuedAt: Date.now(),\n        targetGroup: hashtag ?? 'global',\n        action: 'SCALE_UP',\n        desiredReplicas: this.surgeReplicas,\n        reason: `Social spike (${deltaPerSecond}/s) for #${hashtag}`\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 3. Hybrid strategy\u2014showcases Strategy composition.\n */\nexport class HybridStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'HybridStrategy';\n  private readonly innerStrategies: ScalingStrategy[];\n\n  constructor(...strategies: ScalingStrategy[]) {\n    this.innerStrategies = strategies;\n  }\n\n  evaluate(input: CombinedMetrics): ScalingCommand | null {\n    for (const strat of this.innerStrategies) {\n      const cmd = strat.evaluate(input);\n      if (cmd) return cmd;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/* =================== Chain-of-Responsibility for Alerting =========================== */\n\ninterface AlertHandler {\n  setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler;\n  handle(message: string): Promise<void>;\n}\n\nabstract class AbstractHandler implements AlertHandler {\n  protected nextHandler?: AlertHandler;\n  setNext(handler: AlertHandler): AlertHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = handler;\n    return handler;\n  }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.nextHandler) {\n      await this.nextHandler.handle(message);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass SlackNotifierHandler extends AbstractHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly logger: Logger) { super(); }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      // Placeholder for Slack webhook call\n      this.logger.info({ msg: 'SlackNotifier', message });\n      // Success, stop chain.\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.error({ err, msg: 'SlackNotifierFailed' });\n      await super.handle(message);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass PagerDutyHandler extends AbstractHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly logger: Logger) { super(); }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      // Placeholder for PagerDuty event trigger\n      this.logger.info({ msg: 'PagerDutyNotifier', message });\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.error({ err, msg: 'PagerDutyNotifierFailed' });\n      await super.handle(message);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass FallbackLoggerHandler extends AbstractHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly logger: Logger) { super(); }\n  async handle(message: string): Promise<void> {\n    this.logger.warn({ msg: 'FallbackLogger', message });\n    await super.handle(message);\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================ Auto-Scaler Service =================================== */\n\nexport class SocialAwareAutoScaler {\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private readonly kafkaProducer: Producer;\n  private readonly natsConn: NatsConnection;\n  private readonly jc = JSONCodec();\n\n  private readonly logger: Logger;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n\n  private slackHandler: AlertHandler;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly kafkaBrokers: string[],\n    private readonly natsUrl: string,\n    strategy?: ScalingStrategy\n  ) {\n    this.logger = pino({ name: 'SocialAwareAutoScaler' });\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({ clientId: 'auto-scaler', brokers: kafkaBrokers });\n    this.kafkaProducer = this.kafka.producer();\n    this.strategy = strategy ?? new HybridStrategy(\n      new SocialTrendingStrategy(),\n      new CpuLoadStrategy()\n    );\n    this.natsConn = {} as any; // will connect later\n\n    // Alert pipeline\n    this.slackHandler = new SlackNotifierHandler(this.logger);\n    this.slackHandler\n      .setNext(new PagerDutyHandler(this.logger))\n      .setNext(new FallbackLoggerHandler(this.logger));\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Bootstrapping ---------- */\n\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      await this.kafkaProducer.connect();\n      this.logger.info('Kafka producer connected');\n\n      // Connect to NATS\n      this.natsConn = await natsConnect({ servers: this.natsUrl });\n      this.logger.info('NATS connected');\n\n      // Subscribe to streams\n      await this.subscribeSystemMetrics();\n      await this.subscribeSocialSignals();\n\n      this.logger.info(`Auto-Scaler started with strategy ${this.strategy.name}`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logger.fatal({ err }, 'Failed to start Auto-Scaler');\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async shutdown(): Promise<void> {\n    await Promise.allSettled([this.kafkaProducer.disconnect(), this.natsConn.close()]);\n    this.logger.info('Graceful shutdown complete.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Internal Subscription Logic ---------- */\n\n  private async subscribeSystemMetrics(): Promise<void> {\n    const consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId: 'auto-scaler-group' });\n    await consumer.connect();\n    await consumer.subscribe({ topic: 'telemetry.system', fromBeginning: false });\n\n    consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        try {\n          const metric: SystemMetric = JSON.parse(payload.message.value!.toString());\n\n          // Merge with any cached social signal if available\n          const combined: CombinedMetrics = { system: metric, social: this.lastSocialSignal };\n\n          await this.maybeScale(combined);\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle system metric message');\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  private lastSocialSignal?: SocialSignal;\n  private async subscribeSocialSignals(): Promise<void> {\n    const sub: Subscription = this.natsConn.subscribe('social.trending');\n    (async () => {\n      for await (const msg of sub) {\n        try {\n          const signal: SocialSignal = this.jc.decode(msg.data);\n          this.lastSocialSignal = signal; // simple cache\n          const dummySystem: SystemMetric = {\n            timestamp: signal.timestamp,\n            instanceId: 'social-only',\n            cpuLoadPct: 0,\n            memoryLoadPct: 0\n          };\n          await this.maybeScale({ system: dummySystem, social: signal });\n\n        } catch (err) {\n          this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to handle social signal message');\n        }\n      }\n    })().catch(err => this.logger.error({ err }, 'NATS subscription failed'));\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Core Decision Loop ---------- */\n\n  private async maybeScale(input: CombinedMetrics): Promise<void> {\n    const cmd = this.strategy.evaluate(input);\n    if (cmd) {\n      this.logger.info({ cmd }, 'Scaling decision issued');\n\n      try {\n        await this.kafkaProducer.send({\n          topic: 'orchestration.scaling.command',\n          messages: [{ key: cmd.targetGroup, value: JSON.stringify(cmd) }]\n        });\n      } catch (err) {\n        this.logger.error({ err }, 'Failed to publish scaling command');\n        await this.slackHandler.handle(`Scaling command failed: ${err}`);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* ============================= Run if main ========================================== */\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  const scaler = new SocialAwareAutoScaler(\n    process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS?.split(',') ?? ['localhost:9092'],\n    process.env.NATS_URL ?? 'nats://127.0.0.1:4222'\n  );\n\n  scaler.start();\n\n  // Graceful shutdown\n  process.on('SIGINT', async () => {\n    await scaler.shutdown();\n    process.exit(0);\n  });\n}\n```",

{
  "file": {
    "content": "```typescript\n/***************************************************************************************************\n *  File:          src/module_22.ts\n *  Project:       PulseSphere SocialOps \u2013 system_monitoring\n *  Description:   Trending-event correlation + auto-scaling engine.\n *\n *  This module listens to enriched social-interaction telemetry (Kafka topic: social_metrics),\n *  detects virality events in real time, predicts the impact on infrastructure capacity and\n *  triggers remediation via a pluggable Strategy + Chain-of-Responsibility implementation.\n *\n *  Patterns showcased\n *  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n *  \u2022 Strategy Pattern               \u2013 ScalingStrategy (HPA, Keda, CustomAutoscaler)\n *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility        \u2013 RemediationHandler (Scaler \u2192 Alerting \u2192 Fallback)\n *  \u2022 Observer Pattern               \u2013 Simple EventEmitter-based listener notification\n *  \u2022 Dependency-Inversion Principle \u2013 high-level policies depend on abstractions, not concretions\n *\n *  External Deps: kafkajs, pino, node-eventemitter-3, @types/node (for timers / events)\n ***************************************************************************************************/\n\nimport { Kafka, Consumer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport EventEmitter from 'events';\nimport pino from 'pino';\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Shared Typings                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Raw event emitted by Social-Interaction stream\n */\ninterface SocialMetricEvent {\n  ts: number;                // epoch millis\n  hashtag: string;           // primary hashtag detected in message\n  likes: number;             // #likes within aggregation window\n  comments: number;          // #comments within aggregation window\n  shares: number;            // #shares within aggregation window\n  viewers: number;           // concurrent live-stream viewers\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculated metadata that augments SocialMetricEvent\n */\ninterface CorrelatedSignal {\n  viralityScore: number;     // Weighted score used to anticipate traffic surge\n  projectedRPS: number;      // Predicted requests-per-second that backend will receive\n}\n\n/**\n * Result produced by a ScalingStrategy. Nullable fields are allowed when\n * strategy deems no action is necessary.\n */\ninterface ScalingDecision {\n  /**\n   * Desired replica count for target deployment (e.g., Kubernetes Deployment)\n   */\n  desiredReplicas: number | null;\n\n  /**\n   * Estimated cost (useful for A/B strategy benchmarking)\n   */\n  expectedCostUSD?: number;\n\n  /**\n   * Optional metadata describing reasoning\n   */\n  rationale?: string;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                          Logging / Observability utils                     */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nconst logger = pino({\n  name: 'virality-correlator',\n  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL || 'info',\n  transport:\n    process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'\n      ? { target: 'pino-pretty', options: { colorize: true } }\n      : undefined,\n});\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Observer Pattern                              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Event bus for internal notifications within this micro-service\n */\nclass InternalBus extends EventEmitter {\n  static readonly EVENTS = {\n    VIRALITY_DETECTED: 'virality_detected',\n    SCALE_DECISION: 'scale_decision',\n    REMEDIATION_FAILED: 'remediation_failed',\n  } as const;\n}\n\nconst bus = new InternalBus();\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                             Strategy Pattern                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Defines contract for a capacity scaling algorithm\n */\ninterface ScalingStrategy {\n  name: string;\n  assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Baseline strategy: HorizontalPodAutoscaler-like rule engine\n */\nclass HPAStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'hpa';\n\n  constructor(\n    private minReplicas: number,\n    private maxReplicas: number,\n    private rpsPerReplica: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const { projectedRPS } = signal;\n    const desired = Math.ceil(projectedRPS / this.rpsPerReplica);\n\n    if (desired <= this.minReplicas) {\n      return { desiredReplicas: this.minReplicas, rationale: 'Within min bounds' };\n    }\n    if (desired >= this.maxReplicas) {\n      return {\n        desiredReplicas: this.maxReplicas,\n        rationale: 'Capped at max replicas',\n      };\n    }\n    return { desiredReplicas: desired, rationale: 'Scaled linearly against RPS' };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Cost-aware custom strategy which chooses between spot and on-demand nodes\n */\nclass CostOptimizedStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'cost_optimized';\n\n  constructor(private baseline: HPAStrategy, private costPerReplica: number) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const base = await this.baseline.assess(signal);\n    if (base.desiredReplicas === null) {\n      return base;\n    }\n    const cost = base.desiredReplicas * this.costPerReplica;\n    return {\n      ...base,\n      expectedCostUSD: cost,\n      rationale: `${base.rationale}. Estimated cost $${cost.toFixed(2)}`,\n    };\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                       Chain-of-Responsibility Pattern                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Abstract handler capable of executing/handling remediation action\n */\nabstract class RemediationHandler {\n  private nextHandler: RemediationHandler | null = null;\n\n  setNext(next: RemediationHandler): RemediationHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = next;\n    return next;\n  }\n\n  async handle(signal: CorrelatedSignal, decision: ScalingDecision): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      const handled = await this.process(signal, decision);\n      if (!handled && this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      logger.error(err, 'Remediation handler threw error');\n      bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, err);\n      if (this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  protected abstract process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean>;\n}\n\n/**\n * First link: Perform actual scaling action via Kubernetes API\n */\nclass KubernetesScaler extends RemediationHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly kubeClient: IKubeClient, private readonly deployment: string) {\n    super();\n  }\n\n  protected async process(\n    _signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    if (decision.desiredReplicas === null) return false;\n\n    logger.info(\n      { deployment: this.deployment, replicas: decision.desiredReplicas },\n      'Scaling deployment',\n    );\n\n    // Safeguard: avoid flapping\n    const current = await this.kubeClient.getReplicaCount(this.deployment);\n    if (current === decision.desiredReplicas) {\n      logger.debug('Desired replica count already satisfied; skipping scale action.');\n      return true;\n    }\n\n    await this.kubeClient.scaleDeployment(this.deployment, decision.desiredReplicas);\n    return true; // handled!\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Second link: Send alert via PagerDuty if scaling failed / not possible\n */\nclass PagerDutyNotifier extends RemediationHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly pdClient: IPagerDutyClient) {\n    super();\n  }\n\n  protected async process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    const sev = decision.desiredReplicas === null ? 'info' : 'warning';\n    const message =\n      decision.desiredReplicas === null\n        ? 'No scaling required.'\n        : `Scaling unsuccessful or insufficient (desired ${decision.desiredReplicas})`;\n\n    await this.pdClient.triggerIncident({\n      severity: sev,\n      summary: `Virality surge for #${signal}. ${message}`,\n    });\n    logger.warn({ severity: sev }, 'PagerDuty incident triggered.');\n    return true; // always consider handled to prevent endless loop\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Optional final link: Fallback logging (noop) \u2013 acts as a sink\n */\nclass NullRemediationHandler extends RemediationHandler {\n  protected async process(): Promise<boolean> {\n    logger.info('Reached end of remediation chain. No further action.');\n    return true;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Clients stubs                                */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n *  In production these would be imported from shared infra packages.\n *  Types kept minimal for brevity.\n */\n\ninterface IKubeClient {\n  getReplicaCount(deployment: string): Promise<number>;\n  scaleDeployment(deployment: string, replicas: number): Promise<void>;\n}\n\ninterface IPagerDutyClient {\n  triggerIncident(payload: { severity: string; summary: string }): Promise<void>;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                         Virality correlation service                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass ViralityCorrelatorService {\n  private consumer: Consumer;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n  private readonly remediationChain: RemediationHandler;\n\n  constructor(\n    kafka: Kafka,\n    strategy: ScalingStrategy,\n    remediationChain: RemediationHandler,\n    private readonly topic = 'social_metrics',\n  ) {\n    this.strategy = strategy;\n    this.remediationChain = remediationChain;\n    this.consumer = kafka.consumer({ groupId: `virality-correlator-${strategy.name}` });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize Kafka consumer and internal listeners\n   */\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.connect();\n    await this.consumer.subscribe({ topic: this.topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    this.consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload) => this.handleMessage(payload).catch(this.handleError),\n    });\n\n    bus.on(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, (err) => {\n      logger.error({ err }, 'Remediation failed \u2013 escalate if necessary');\n    });\n\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service started.');\n  }\n\n  async stop(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.disconnect();\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service stopped.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------------------------- Private Helpers --------------------------- */\n\n  /**\n   * Parse and process each message coming from Kafka.\n   */\n  private async handleMessage({ message }: EachMessagePayload): Promise<void> {\n    if (!message.value) return;\n    const raw: SocialMetricEvent = JSON.parse(message.value.toString());\n\n    const correlated = this.enrich(raw);\n    if (correlated.viralityScore < 0.7) {\n      // below threshold \u2013 ignore to reduce noise\n      return;\n    }\n\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.VIRALITY_DETECTED, correlated);\n    logger.debug({ correlated }, 'Virality detected');\n\n    const decision = await this.strategy.assess(correlated);\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.SCALE_DECISION, decision);\n    logger.info({ decision }, 'Scaling decision generated');\n\n    await this.remediationChain.handle(correlated, decision);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Enrichment algorithm \u2013 a simplistic scoring heuristic\n   */\n  private enrich(event: SocialMetricEvent): CorrelatedSignal {\n    const { likes, comments, shares, viewers } = event;\n\n    // Weighted sum, tuned offline with historical data\n    const viralityScore =\n      0.4 * this.norm(likes) + 0.3 * this.norm(comments) + 0.2 * this.norm(shares) + 0.1 * this.norm(viewers);\n\n    // Convert virality score to projected RPS using linear regression coefficients\n    const projectedRPS = Math.round(viralityScore * 1500); // 1.0 \u2248 1500rps\n\n    return { viralityScore, projectedRPS };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Normalize raw counter via log scale to squish heavy tails\n   */\n  private norm(value: number): number {\n    if (value <= 0) return 0;\n    return Math.min(1, Math.log10(value + 1) / 4); // log10(10k) ~= 4\n  }\n\n  private handleError(err: unknown): void {\n    logger.error(err, 'Error while processing Kafka message');\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Bootstrap Code                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nasync function main(): Promise<void> {\n  const kafka = new Kafka({\n    clientId: 'pulse-sphere-correlator',\n    brokers: (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS || 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n    connectionTimeout: 3000,\n  });\n\n  // Wire strategies\n  const hpa = new HPAStrategy(\n    Number(process.env.MIN_REPLICAS) || 3,\n    Number(process.env.MAX_REPLICAS) || 60,\n    Number(process.env.RPS_PER_REPLICA) || 100,\n  );\n  const strategy: ScalingStrategy = process.env.STRATEGY === 'cost'\n    ? new CostOptimizedStrategy(hpa, Number(process.env.COST_PER_REPLICA) || 0.07)\n    : hpa;\n\n  // Wire remediation chain\n  const kubeClient: IKubeClient = {\n    async getReplicaCount() {\n      // TODO: integrate @kubernetes/client-node\n      return 5;\n    },\n    async scaleDeployment(_deploy, _replicas) {\n      // TODO: call K8s API\n      logger.info('Mock scaleDeployment called.');\n    },\n  };\n  const pagerDutyClient: IPagerDutyClient = {\n    async triggerIncident(payload) {\n      // TODO: call PagerDuty API\n      logger.warn({ payload }, 'Mock PagerDuty incident');\n    },\n  };\n\n  const scaler = new KubernetesScaler(kubeClient, process.env.TARGET_DEPLOYMENT || 'api-backend');\n  const notifier = new PagerDutyNotifier(pagerDutyClient);\n  const sink = new NullRemediationHandler();\n\n  scaler.setNext(notifier).setNext(sink);\n\n  const service = new ViralityCorrelatorService(kafka, strategy, scaler);\n\n  // Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM / SIGINT\n  const shutdown = async () => {\n    logger.info('Received shutdown signal');\n    await service.stop();\n    process.exit(0);\n  };\n\n  process.on('SIGTERM', shutdown);\n  process.on('SIGINT', shutdown);\n\n  await service.start();\n}\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises\n  main();\n}\n```\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_22.ts",
    "numLines": 447,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 447
  },
  "type": "text"
}
