Input
{
  "content": "/***************************************************************************************************\n *  File:          src/module_22.ts\n *  Project:       PulseSphere SocialOps \u2013 system_monitoring\n *  Description:   Trending-event correlation + auto-scaling engine.\n *\n *  This module listens to enriched social-interaction telemetry (Kafka topic: social_metrics),\n *  detects virality events in real time, predicts the impact on infrastructure capacity and\n *  triggers remediation via a pluggable Strategy + Chain-of-Responsibility implementation.\n *  Alerts are dispatched via the centralized NotificationService.\n *\n *  Patterns showcased\n *  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n *  \u2022 Strategy Pattern               \u2013 ScalingStrategy (HPA, Keda, CustomAutoscaler)\n *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility        \u2013 RemediationHandler (Scaler \u2192 Alerting \u2192 Fallback)\n *  \u2022 Observer Pattern               \u2013 Simple EventEmitter-based listener notification\n *  \u2022 Dependency-Inversion Principle \u2013 high-level policies depend on abstractions, not concretions\n *\n *  External Deps: kafkajs, pino, node-eventemitter-3, @types/node (for timers / events)\n ***************************************************************************************************/\n\nimport { Kafka, Consumer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport EventEmitter from 'events';\nimport pino from 'pino';\nimport { notificationService, AlertMessage } from './services/notificationService';\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Shared Typings                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Raw event emitted by Social-Interaction stream\n */\ninterface SocialMetricEvent {\n  ts: number;                // epoch millis\n  hashtag: string;           // primary hashtag detected in message\n  likes: number;             // #likes within aggregation window\n  comments: number;          // #comments within aggregation window\n  shares: number;            // #shares within aggregation window\n  viewers: number;           // concurrent live-stream viewers\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculated metadata that augments SocialMetricEvent\n */\ninterface CorrelatedSignal {\n  viralityScore: number;     // Weighted score used to anticipate traffic surge\n  projectedRPS: number;      // Predicted requests-per-second that backend will receive\n}\n\n/**\n * Result produced by a ScalingStrategy. Nullable fields are allowed when\n * strategy deems no action is necessary.\n */\ninterface ScalingDecision {\n  /**\n   * Desired replica count for target deployment (e.g., Kubernetes Deployment)\n   */\n  desiredReplicas: number | null;\n\n  /**\n   * Estimated cost (useful for A/B strategy benchmarking)\n   */\n  expectedCostUSD?: number;\n\n  /**\n   * Optional metadata describing reasoning\n   */\n  rationale?: string;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                          Logging / Observability utils                     */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nconst logger = pino({\n  name: 'virality-correlator',\n  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL || 'info',\n  transport:\n    process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'\n      ? { target: 'pino-pretty', options: { colorize: true } }\n      : undefined,\n});\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Observer Pattern                              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Event bus for internal notifications within this micro-service\n */\nclass InternalBus extends EventEmitter {\n  static readonly EVENTS = {\n    VIRALITY_DETECTED: 'virality_detected',\n    SCALE_DECISION: 'scale_decision',\n    REMEDIATION_FAILED: 'remediation_failed',\n  } as const;\n}\n\nconst bus = new InternalBus();\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                             Strategy Pattern                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Defines contract for a capacity scaling algorithm\n */\ninterface ScalingStrategy {\n  name: string;\n  assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Baseline strategy: HorizontalPodAutoscaler-like rule engine\n */\nclass HPAStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'hpa';\n\n  constructor(\n    private minReplicas: number,\n    private maxReplicas: number,\n    private rpsPerReplica: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const { projectedRPS } = signal;\n    const desired = Math.ceil(projectedRPS / this.rpsPerReplica);\n\n    if (desired <= this.minReplicas) {\n      return { desiredReplicas: this.minReplicas, rationale: 'Within min bounds' };\n    }\n    if (desired >= this.maxReplicas) {\n      return {\n        desiredReplicas: this.maxReplicas,\n        rationale: 'Capped at max replicas',\n      };\n    }\n    return { desiredReplicas: desired, rationale: 'Scaled linearly against RPS' };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Cost-aware custom strategy which chooses between spot and on-demand nodes\n */\nclass CostOptimizedStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'cost_optimized';\n\n  constructor(private baseline: HPAStrategy, private costPerReplica: number) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const base = await this.baseline.assess(signal);\n    if (base.desiredReplicas === null) {\n      return base;\n    }\n    const cost = base.desiredReplicas * this.costPerReplica;\n    return {\n      ...base,\n      expectedCostUSD: cost,\n      rationale: `${base.rationale}. Estimated cost $${cost.toFixed(2)}`,\n    };\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                       Chain-of-Responsibility Pattern                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Abstract handler capable of executing/handling remediation action\n */\nabstract class RemediationHandler {\n  private nextHandler: RemediationHandler | null = null;\n\n  setNext(next: RemediationHandler): RemediationHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = next;\n    return next;\n  }\n\n  async handle(signal: CorrelatedSignal, decision: ScalingDecision): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      const handled = await this.process(signal, decision);\n      if (!handled && this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      logger.error(err, 'Remediation handler threw error');\n      bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, err);\n      if (this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  protected abstract process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean>;\n}\n\n/**\n * First link: Perform actual scaling action via Kubernetes API\n */\nclass KubernetesScaler extends RemediationHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly kubeClient: IKubeClient, private readonly deployment: string) {\n    super();\n  }\n\n  protected async process(\n    _signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    if (decision.desiredReplicas === null) return false;\n\n    logger.info(\n      { deployment: this.deployment, replicas: decision.desiredReplicas },\n      'Scaling deployment',\n    );\n\n    // Safeguard: avoid flapping\n    const current = await this.kubeClient.getReplicaCount(this.deployment);\n    if (current === decision.desiredReplicas) {\n      logger.debug('Desired replica count already satisfied; skipping scale action.');\n      return true;\n    }\n\n    await this.kubeClient.scaleDeployment(this.deployment, decision.desiredReplicas);\n    return true; // handled!\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Second link: Send alert via NotificationService if scaling failed / not possible\n */\nclass AlertNotifier extends RemediationHandler {\n  protected async process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    const severity: AlertMessage['severity'] = decision.desiredReplicas === null ? 'info' : 'warning';\n    const message =\n      decision.desiredReplicas === null\n        ? 'No scaling required.'\n        : `Scaling unsuccessful or insufficient (desired ${decision.desiredReplicas})`;\n\n    const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n      severity,\n      title: `Virality surge alert`,\n      details: {\n        viralityScore: signal.viralityScore,\n        projectedRPS: signal.projectedRPS,\n        desiredReplicas: decision.desiredReplicas,\n        rationale: decision.rationale,\n        message,\n      },\n      sourceModule: 'module_22',\n    };\n\n    await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n    logger.warn({ severity }, 'Alert dispatched via NotificationService.');\n    return true; // always consider handled to prevent endless loop\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Optional final link: Fallback logging (noop) \u2013 acts as a sink\n */\nclass NullRemediationHandler extends RemediationHandler {\n  protected async process(): Promise<boolean> {\n    logger.info('Reached end of remediation chain. No further action.');\n    return true;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Clients stubs                                */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n *  In production these would be imported from shared infra packages.\n *  Types kept minimal for brevity.\n */\n\ninterface IKubeClient {\n  getReplicaCount(deployment: string): Promise<number>;\n  scaleDeployment(deployment: string, replicas: number): Promise<void>;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                         Virality correlation service                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass ViralityCorrelatorService {\n  private consumer: Consumer;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n  private readonly remediationChain: RemediationHandler;\n\n  constructor(\n    kafka: Kafka,\n    strategy: ScalingStrategy,\n    remediationChain: RemediationHandler,\n    private readonly topic = 'social_metrics',\n  ) {\n    this.strategy = strategy;\n    this.remediationChain = remediationChain;\n    this.consumer = kafka.consumer({ groupId: `virality-correlator-${strategy.name}` });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize Kafka consumer and internal listeners\n   */\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.connect();\n    await this.consumer.subscribe({ topic: this.topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    this.consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload) => this.handleMessage(payload).catch(this.handleError),\n    });\n\n    bus.on(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, (err) => {\n      logger.error({ err }, 'Remediation failed \u2013 escalate if necessary');\n    });\n\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service started.');\n  }\n\n  async stop(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.disconnect();\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service stopped.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------------------------- Private Helpers --------------------------- */\n\n  /**\n   * Parse and process each message coming from Kafka.\n   */\n  private async handleMessage({ message }: EachMessagePayload): Promise<void> {\n    if (!message.value) return;\n    const raw: SocialMetricEvent = JSON.parse(message.value.toString());\n\n    const correlated = this.enrich(raw);\n    if (correlated.viralityScore < 0.7) {\n      // below threshold \u2013 ignore to reduce noise\n      return;\n    }\n\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.VIRALITY_DETECTED, correlated);\n    logger.debug({ correlated }, 'Virality detected');\n\n    const decision = await this.strategy.assess(correlated);\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.SCALE_DECISION, decision);\n    logger.info({ decision }, 'Scaling decision generated');\n\n    await this.remediationChain.handle(correlated, decision);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Enrichment algorithm \u2013 a simplistic scoring heuristic\n   */\n  private enrich(event: SocialMetricEvent): CorrelatedSignal {\n    const { likes, comments, shares, viewers } = event;\n\n    // Weighted sum, tuned offline with historical data\n    const viralityScore =\n      0.4 * this.norm(likes) + 0.3 * this.norm(comments) + 0.2 * this.norm(shares) + 0.1 * this.norm(viewers);\n\n    // Convert virality score to projected RPS using linear regression coefficients\n    const projectedRPS = Math.round(viralityScore * 1500); // 1.0 \u2248 1500rps\n\n    return { viralityScore, projectedRPS };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Normalize raw counter via log scale to squish heavy tails\n   */\n  private norm(value: number): number {\n    if (value <= 0) return 0;\n    return Math.min(1, Math.log10(value + 1) / 4); // log10(10k) ~= 4\n  }\n\n  private handleError(err: unknown): void {\n    logger.error(err, 'Error while processing Kafka message');\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Bootstrap Code                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nasync function main(): Promise<void> {\n  const kafka = new Kafka({\n    clientId: 'pulse-sphere-correlator',\n    brokers: (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS || 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n    connectionTimeout: 3000,\n  });\n\n  // Wire strategies\n  const hpa = new HPAStrategy(\n    Number(process.env.MIN_REPLICAS) || 3,\n    Number(process.env.MAX_REPLICAS) || 60,\n    Number(process.env.RPS_PER_REPLICA) || 100,\n  );\n  const strategy: ScalingStrategy = process.env.STRATEGY === 'cost'\n    ? new CostOptimizedStrategy(hpa, Number(process.env.COST_PER_REPLICA) || 0.07)\n    : hpa;\n\n  // Wire remediation chain\n  const kubeClient: IKubeClient = {\n    async getReplicaCount() {\n      // TODO: integrate @kubernetes/client-node\n      return 5;\n    },\n    async scaleDeployment(_deploy, _replicas) {\n      // TODO: call K8s API\n      logger.info('Mock scaleDeployment called.');\n    },\n  };\n\n  const scaler = new KubernetesScaler(kubeClient, process.env.TARGET_DEPLOYMENT || 'api-backend');\n  const notifier = new AlertNotifier();\n  const sink = new NullRemediationHandler();\n\n  scaler.setNext(notifier).setNext(sink);\n\n  const service = new ViralityCorrelatorService(kafka, strategy, scaler);\n\n  // Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM / SIGINT\n  const shutdown = async () => {\n    logger.info('Received shutdown signal');\n    await service.stop();\n    process.exit(0);\n  };\n\n  process.on('SIGTERM', shutdown);\n  process.on('SIGINT', shutdown);\n\n  await service.start();\n}\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises\n  main();\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/project/src/module_22.ts"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/***************************************************************************************************\n *  File:          src/module_22.ts\n *  Project:       PulseSphere SocialOps \u2013 system_monitoring\n *  Description:   Trending-event correlation + auto-scaling engine.\n *\n *  This module listens to enriched social-interaction telemetry (Kafka topic: social_metrics),\n *  detects virality events in real time, predicts the impact on infrastructure capacity and\n *  triggers remediation via a pluggable Strategy + Chain-of-Responsibility implementation.\n *  Alerts are dispatched via the centralized NotificationService.\n *\n *  Patterns showcased\n *  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n *  \u2022 Strategy Pattern               \u2013 ScalingStrategy (HPA, Keda, CustomAutoscaler)\n *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility        \u2013 RemediationHandler (Scaler \u2192 Alerting \u2192 Fallback)\n *  \u2022 Observer Pattern               \u2013 Simple EventEmitter-based listener notification\n *  \u2022 Dependency-Inversion Principle \u2013 high-level policies depend on abstractions, not concretions\n *\n *  External Deps: kafkajs, pino, node-eventemitter-3, @types/node (for timers / events)\n ***************************************************************************************************/\n\nimport { Kafka, Consumer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport EventEmitter from 'events';\nimport pino from 'pino';\nimport { notificationService, AlertMessage } from './services/notificationService';\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Shared Typings                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Raw event emitted by Social-Interaction stream\n */\ninterface SocialMetricEvent {\n  ts: number;                // epoch millis\n  hashtag: string;           // primary hashtag detected in message\n  likes: number;             // #likes within aggregation window\n  comments: number;          // #comments within aggregation window\n  shares: number;            // #shares within aggregation window\n  viewers: number;           // concurrent live-stream viewers\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculated metadata that augments SocialMetricEvent\n */\ninterface CorrelatedSignal {\n  viralityScore: number;     // Weighted score used to anticipate traffic surge\n  projectedRPS: number;      // Predicted requests-per-second that backend will receive\n}\n\n/**\n * Result produced by a ScalingStrategy. Nullable fields are allowed when\n * strategy deems no action is necessary.\n */\ninterface ScalingDecision {\n  /**\n   * Desired replica count for target deployment (e.g., Kubernetes Deployment)\n   */\n  desiredReplicas: number | null;\n\n  /**\n   * Estimated cost (useful for A/B strategy benchmarking)\n   */\n  expectedCostUSD?: number;\n\n  /**\n   * Optional metadata describing reasoning\n   */\n  rationale?: string;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                          Logging / Observability utils                     */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nconst logger = pino({\n  name: 'virality-correlator',\n  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL || 'info',\n  transport:\n    process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'\n      ? { target: 'pino-pretty', options: { colorize: true } }\n      : undefined,\n});\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Observer Pattern                              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Event bus for internal notifications within this micro-service\n */\nclass InternalBus extends EventEmitter {\n  static readonly EVENTS = {\n    VIRALITY_DETECTED: 'virality_detected',\n    SCALE_DECISION: 'scale_decision',\n    REMEDIATION_FAILED: 'remediation_failed',\n  } as const;\n}\n\nconst bus = new InternalBus();\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                             Strategy Pattern                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Defines contract for a capacity scaling algorithm\n */\ninterface ScalingStrategy {\n  name: string;\n  assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Baseline strategy: HorizontalPodAutoscaler-like rule engine\n */\nclass HPAStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'hpa';\n\n  constructor(\n    private minReplicas: number,\n    private maxReplicas: number,\n    private rpsPerReplica: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const { projectedRPS } = signal;\n    const desired = Math.ceil(projectedRPS / this.rpsPerReplica);\n\n    if (desired <= this.minReplicas) {\n      return { desiredReplicas: this.minReplicas, rationale: 'Within min bounds' };\n    }\n    if (desired >= this.maxReplicas) {\n      return {\n        desiredReplicas: this.maxReplicas,\n        rationale: 'Capped at max replicas',\n      };\n    }\n    return { desiredReplicas: desired, rationale: 'Scaled linearly against RPS' };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Cost-aware custom strategy which chooses between spot and on-demand nodes\n */\nclass CostOptimizedStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'cost_optimized';\n\n  constructor(private baseline: HPAStrategy, private costPerReplica: number) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const base = await this.baseline.assess(signal);\n    if (base.desiredReplicas === null) {\n      return base;\n    }\n    const cost = base.desiredReplicas * this.costPerReplica;\n    return {\n      ...base,\n      expectedCostUSD: cost,\n      rationale: `${base.rationale}. Estimated cost $${cost.toFixed(2)}`,\n    };\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                       Chain-of-Responsibility Pattern                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Abstract handler capable of executing/handling remediation action\n */\nabstract class RemediationHandler {\n  private nextHandler: RemediationHandler | null = null;\n\n  setNext(next: RemediationHandler): RemediationHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = next;\n    return next;\n  }\n\n  async handle(signal: CorrelatedSignal, decision: ScalingDecision): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      const handled = await this.process(signal, decision);\n      if (!handled && this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      logger.error(err, 'Remediation handler threw error');\n      bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, err);\n      if (this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  protected abstract process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean>;\n}\n\n/**\n * First link: Perform actual scaling action via Kubernetes API\n */\nclass KubernetesScaler extends RemediationHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly kubeClient: IKubeClient, private readonly deployment: string) {\n    super();\n  }\n\n  protected async process(\n    _signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    if (decision.desiredReplicas === null) return false;\n\n    logger.info(\n      { deployment: this.deployment, replicas: decision.desiredReplicas },\n      'Scaling deployment',\n    );\n\n    // Safeguard: avoid flapping\n    const current = await this.kubeClient.getReplicaCount(this.deployment);\n    if (current === decision.desiredReplicas) {\n      logger.debug('Desired replica count already satisfied; skipping scale action.');\n      return true;\n    }\n\n    await this.kubeClient.scaleDeployment(this.deployment, decision.desiredReplicas);\n    return true; // handled!\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Second link: Send alert via NotificationService if scaling failed / not possible\n */\nclass AlertNotifier extends RemediationHandler {\n  protected async process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    const severity: AlertMessage['severity'] = decision.desiredReplicas === null ? 'info' : 'warning';\n    const message =\n      decision.desiredReplicas === null\n        ? 'No scaling required.'\n        : `Scaling unsuccessful or insufficient (desired ${decision.desiredReplicas})`;\n\n    const alertMessage: AlertMessage = {\n      severity,\n      title: `Virality surge alert`,\n      details: {\n        viralityScore: signal.viralityScore,\n        projectedRPS: signal.projectedRPS,\n        desiredReplicas: decision.desiredReplicas,\n        rationale: decision.rationale,\n        message,\n      },\n      sourceModule: 'module_22',\n    };\n\n    await notificationService.dispatch(alertMessage);\n    logger.warn({ severity }, 'Alert dispatched via NotificationService.');\n    return true; // always consider handled to prevent endless loop\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Optional final link: Fallback logging (noop) \u2013 acts as a sink\n */\nclass NullRemediationHandler extends RemediationHandler {\n  protected async process(): Promise<boolean> {\n    logger.info('Reached end of remediation chain. No further action.');\n    return true;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Clients stubs                                */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n *  In production these would be imported from shared infra packages.\n *  Types kept minimal for brevity.\n */\n\ninterface IKubeClient {\n  getReplicaCount(deployment: string): Promise<number>;\n  scaleDeployment(deployment: string, replicas: number): Promise<void>;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                         Virality correlation service                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass ViralityCorrelatorService {\n  private consumer: Consumer;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n  private readonly remediationChain: RemediationHandler;\n\n  constructor(\n    kafka: Kafka,\n    strategy: ScalingStrategy,\n    remediationChain: RemediationHandler,\n    private readonly topic = 'social_metrics',\n  ) {\n    this.strategy = strategy;\n    this.remediationChain = remediationChain;\n    this.consumer = kafka.consumer({ groupId: `virality-correlator-${strategy.name}` });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize Kafka consumer and internal listeners\n   */\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.connect();\n    await this.consumer.subscribe({ topic: this.topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    this.consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload) => this.handleMessage(payload).catch(this.handleError),\n    });\n\n    bus.on(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, (err) => {\n      logger.error({ err }, 'Remediation failed \u2013 escalate if necessary');\n    });\n\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service started.');\n  }\n\n  async stop(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.disconnect();\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service stopped.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------------------------- Private Helpers --------------------------- */\n\n  /**\n   * Parse and process each message coming from Kafka.\n   */\n  private async handleMessage({ message }: EachMessagePayload): Promise<void> {\n    if (!message.value) return;\n    const raw: SocialMetricEvent = JSON.parse(message.value.toString());\n\n    const correlated = this.enrich(raw);\n    if (correlated.viralityScore < 0.7) {\n      // below threshold \u2013 ignore to reduce noise\n      return;\n    }\n\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.VIRALITY_DETECTED, correlated);\n    logger.debug({ correlated }, 'Virality detected');\n\n    const decision = await this.strategy.assess(correlated);\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.SCALE_DECISION, decision);\n    logger.info({ decision }, 'Scaling decision generated');\n\n    await this.remediationChain.handle(correlated, decision);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Enrichment algorithm \u2013 a simplistic scoring heuristic\n   */\n  private enrich(event: SocialMetricEvent): CorrelatedSignal {\n    const { likes, comments, shares, viewers } = event;\n\n    // Weighted sum, tuned offline with historical data\n    const viralityScore =\n      0.4 * this.norm(likes) + 0.3 * this.norm(comments) + 0.2 * this.norm(shares) + 0.1 * this.norm(viewers);\n\n    // Convert virality score to projected RPS using linear regression coefficients\n    const projectedRPS = Math.round(viralityScore * 1500); // 1.0 \u2248 1500rps\n\n    return { viralityScore, projectedRPS };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Normalize raw counter via log scale to squish heavy tails\n   */\n  private norm(value: number): number {\n    if (value <= 0) return 0;\n    return Math.min(1, Math.log10(value + 1) / 4); // log10(10k) ~= 4\n  }\n\n  private handleError(err: unknown): void {\n    logger.error(err, 'Error while processing Kafka message');\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Bootstrap Code                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nasync function main(): Promise<void> {\n  const kafka = new Kafka({\n    clientId: 'pulse-sphere-correlator',\n    brokers: (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS || 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n    connectionTimeout: 3000,\n  });\n\n  // Wire strategies\n  const hpa = new HPAStrategy(\n    Number(process.env.MIN_REPLICAS) || 3,\n    Number(process.env.MAX_REPLICAS) || 60,\n    Number(process.env.RPS_PER_REPLICA) || 100,\n  );\n  const strategy: ScalingStrategy = process.env.STRATEGY === 'cost'\n    ? new CostOptimizedStrategy(hpa, Number(process.env.COST_PER_REPLICA) || 0.07)\n    : hpa;\n\n  // Wire remediation chain\n  const kubeClient: IKubeClient = {\n    async getReplicaCount() {\n      // TODO: integrate @kubernetes/client-node\n      return 5;\n    },\n    async scaleDeployment(_deploy, _replicas) {\n      // TODO: call K8s API\n      logger.info('Mock scaleDeployment called.');\n    },\n  };\n\n  const scaler = new KubernetesScaler(kubeClient, process.env.TARGET_DEPLOYMENT || 'api-backend');\n  const notifier = new AlertNotifier();\n  const sink = new NullRemediationHandler();\n\n  scaler.setNext(notifier).setNext(sink);\n\n  const service = new ViralityCorrelatorService(kafka, strategy, scaler);\n\n  // Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM / SIGINT\n  const shutdown = async () => {\n    logger.info('Received shutdown signal');\n    await service.stop();\n    process.exit(0);\n  };\n\n  process.on('SIGTERM', shutdown);\n  process.on('SIGINT', shutdown);\n\n  await service.start();\n}\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises\n  main();\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_22.ts",
  "originalFile": "```typescript\n/***************************************************************************************************\n *  File:          src/module_22.ts\n *  Project:       PulseSphere SocialOps \u2013 system_monitoring\n *  Description:   Trending-event correlation + auto-scaling engine.\n *\n *  This module listens to enriched social-interaction telemetry (Kafka topic: social_metrics),\n *  detects virality events in real time, predicts the impact on infrastructure capacity and\n *  triggers remediation via a pluggable Strategy + Chain-of-Responsibility implementation.\n *\n *  Patterns showcased\n *  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n *  \u2022 Strategy Pattern               \u2013 ScalingStrategy (HPA, Keda, CustomAutoscaler)\n *  \u2022 Chain-of-Responsibility        \u2013 RemediationHandler (Scaler \u2192 Alerting \u2192 Fallback)\n *  \u2022 Observer Pattern               \u2013 Simple EventEmitter-based listener notification\n *  \u2022 Dependency-Inversion Principle \u2013 high-level policies depend on abstractions, not concretions\n *\n *  External Deps: kafkajs, pino, node-eventemitter-3, @types/node (for timers / events)\n ***************************************************************************************************/\n\nimport { Kafka, Consumer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport EventEmitter from 'events';\nimport pino from 'pino';\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Shared Typings                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Raw event emitted by Social-Interaction stream\n */\ninterface SocialMetricEvent {\n  ts: number;                // epoch millis\n  hashtag: string;           // primary hashtag detected in message\n  likes: number;             // #likes within aggregation window\n  comments: number;          // #comments within aggregation window\n  shares: number;            // #shares within aggregation window\n  viewers: number;           // concurrent live-stream viewers\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculated metadata that augments SocialMetricEvent\n */\ninterface CorrelatedSignal {\n  viralityScore: number;     // Weighted score used to anticipate traffic surge\n  projectedRPS: number;      // Predicted requests-per-second that backend will receive\n}\n\n/**\n * Result produced by a ScalingStrategy. Nullable fields are allowed when\n * strategy deems no action is necessary.\n */\ninterface ScalingDecision {\n  /**\n   * Desired replica count for target deployment (e.g., Kubernetes Deployment)\n   */\n  desiredReplicas: number | null;\n\n  /**\n   * Estimated cost (useful for A/B strategy benchmarking)\n   */\n  expectedCostUSD?: number;\n\n  /**\n   * Optional metadata describing reasoning\n   */\n  rationale?: string;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                          Logging / Observability utils                     */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nconst logger = pino({\n  name: 'virality-correlator',\n  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL || 'info',\n  transport:\n    process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'\n      ? { target: 'pino-pretty', options: { colorize: true } }\n      : undefined,\n});\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                              Observer Pattern                              */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Event bus for internal notifications within this micro-service\n */\nclass InternalBus extends EventEmitter {\n  static readonly EVENTS = {\n    VIRALITY_DETECTED: 'virality_detected',\n    SCALE_DECISION: 'scale_decision',\n    REMEDIATION_FAILED: 'remediation_failed',\n  } as const;\n}\n\nconst bus = new InternalBus();\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                             Strategy Pattern                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Defines contract for a capacity scaling algorithm\n */\ninterface ScalingStrategy {\n  name: string;\n  assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Baseline strategy: HorizontalPodAutoscaler-like rule engine\n */\nclass HPAStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'hpa';\n\n  constructor(\n    private minReplicas: number,\n    private maxReplicas: number,\n    private rpsPerReplica: number,\n  ) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const { projectedRPS } = signal;\n    const desired = Math.ceil(projectedRPS / this.rpsPerReplica);\n\n    if (desired <= this.minReplicas) {\n      return { desiredReplicas: this.minReplicas, rationale: 'Within min bounds' };\n    }\n    if (desired >= this.maxReplicas) {\n      return {\n        desiredReplicas: this.maxReplicas,\n        rationale: 'Capped at max replicas',\n      };\n    }\n    return { desiredReplicas: desired, rationale: 'Scaled linearly against RPS' };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Cost-aware custom strategy which chooses between spot and on-demand nodes\n */\nclass CostOptimizedStrategy implements ScalingStrategy {\n  public readonly name = 'cost_optimized';\n\n  constructor(private baseline: HPAStrategy, private costPerReplica: number) {}\n\n  async assess(signal: CorrelatedSignal): Promise<ScalingDecision> {\n    const base = await this.baseline.assess(signal);\n    if (base.desiredReplicas === null) {\n      return base;\n    }\n    const cost = base.desiredReplicas * this.costPerReplica;\n    return {\n      ...base,\n      expectedCostUSD: cost,\n      rationale: `${base.rationale}. Estimated cost $${cost.toFixed(2)}`,\n    };\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                       Chain-of-Responsibility Pattern                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n * Abstract handler capable of executing/handling remediation action\n */\nabstract class RemediationHandler {\n  private nextHandler: RemediationHandler | null = null;\n\n  setNext(next: RemediationHandler): RemediationHandler {\n    this.nextHandler = next;\n    return next;\n  }\n\n  async handle(signal: CorrelatedSignal, decision: ScalingDecision): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      const handled = await this.process(signal, decision);\n      if (!handled && this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      logger.error(err, 'Remediation handler threw error');\n      bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, err);\n      if (this.nextHandler) {\n        await this.nextHandler.handle(signal, decision);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  protected abstract process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean>;\n}\n\n/**\n * First link: Perform actual scaling action via Kubernetes API\n */\nclass KubernetesScaler extends RemediationHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly kubeClient: IKubeClient, private readonly deployment: string) {\n    super();\n  }\n\n  protected async process(\n    _signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    if (decision.desiredReplicas === null) return false;\n\n    logger.info(\n      { deployment: this.deployment, replicas: decision.desiredReplicas },\n      'Scaling deployment',\n    );\n\n    // Safeguard: avoid flapping\n    const current = await this.kubeClient.getReplicaCount(this.deployment);\n    if (current === decision.desiredReplicas) {\n      logger.debug('Desired replica count already satisfied; skipping scale action.');\n      return true;\n    }\n\n    await this.kubeClient.scaleDeployment(this.deployment, decision.desiredReplicas);\n    return true; // handled!\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Second link: Send alert via PagerDuty if scaling failed / not possible\n */\nclass PagerDutyNotifier extends RemediationHandler {\n  constructor(private readonly pdClient: IPagerDutyClient) {\n    super();\n  }\n\n  protected async process(\n    signal: CorrelatedSignal,\n    decision: ScalingDecision,\n  ): Promise<boolean> {\n    const sev = decision.desiredReplicas === null ? 'info' : 'warning';\n    const message =\n      decision.desiredReplicas === null\n        ? 'No scaling required.'\n        : `Scaling unsuccessful or insufficient (desired ${decision.desiredReplicas})`;\n\n    await this.pdClient.triggerIncident({\n      severity: sev,\n      summary: `Virality surge for #${signal}. ${message}`,\n    });\n    logger.warn({ severity: sev }, 'PagerDuty incident triggered.');\n    return true; // always consider handled to prevent endless loop\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Optional final link: Fallback logging (noop) \u2013 acts as a sink\n */\nclass NullRemediationHandler extends RemediationHandler {\n  protected async process(): Promise<boolean> {\n    logger.info('Reached end of remediation chain. No further action.');\n    return true;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Clients stubs                                */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/**\n *  In production these would be imported from shared infra packages.\n *  Types kept minimal for brevity.\n */\n\ninterface IKubeClient {\n  getReplicaCount(deployment: string): Promise<number>;\n  scaleDeployment(deployment: string, replicas: number): Promise<void>;\n}\n\ninterface IPagerDutyClient {\n  triggerIncident(payload: { severity: string; summary: string }): Promise<void>;\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                         Virality correlation service                       */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nclass ViralityCorrelatorService {\n  private consumer: Consumer;\n  private readonly strategy: ScalingStrategy;\n  private readonly remediationChain: RemediationHandler;\n\n  constructor(\n    kafka: Kafka,\n    strategy: ScalingStrategy,\n    remediationChain: RemediationHandler,\n    private readonly topic = 'social_metrics',\n  ) {\n    this.strategy = strategy;\n    this.remediationChain = remediationChain;\n    this.consumer = kafka.consumer({ groupId: `virality-correlator-${strategy.name}` });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize Kafka consumer and internal listeners\n   */\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.connect();\n    await this.consumer.subscribe({ topic: this.topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    this.consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload) => this.handleMessage(payload).catch(this.handleError),\n    });\n\n    bus.on(InternalBus.EVENTS.REMEDIATION_FAILED, (err) => {\n      logger.error({ err }, 'Remediation failed \u2013 escalate if necessary');\n    });\n\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service started.');\n  }\n\n  async stop(): Promise<void> {\n    await this.consumer.disconnect();\n    logger.info('Virality correlator service stopped.');\n  }\n\n  /* ---------------------------- Private Helpers --------------------------- */\n\n  /**\n   * Parse and process each message coming from Kafka.\n   */\n  private async handleMessage({ message }: EachMessagePayload): Promise<void> {\n    if (!message.value) return;\n    const raw: SocialMetricEvent = JSON.parse(message.value.toString());\n\n    const correlated = this.enrich(raw);\n    if (correlated.viralityScore < 0.7) {\n      // below threshold \u2013 ignore to reduce noise\n      return;\n    }\n\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.VIRALITY_DETECTED, correlated);\n    logger.debug({ correlated }, 'Virality detected');\n\n    const decision = await this.strategy.assess(correlated);\n    bus.emit(InternalBus.EVENTS.SCALE_DECISION, decision);\n    logger.info({ decision }, 'Scaling decision generated');\n\n    await this.remediationChain.handle(correlated, decision);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Enrichment algorithm \u2013 a simplistic scoring heuristic\n   */\n  private enrich(event: SocialMetricEvent): CorrelatedSignal {\n    const { likes, comments, shares, viewers } = event;\n\n    // Weighted sum, tuned offline with historical data\n    const viralityScore =\n      0.4 * this.norm(likes) + 0.3 * this.norm(comments) + 0.2 * this.norm(shares) + 0.1 * this.norm(viewers);\n\n    // Convert virality score to projected RPS using linear regression coefficients\n    const projectedRPS = Math.round(viralityScore * 1500); // 1.0 \u2248 1500rps\n\n    return { viralityScore, projectedRPS };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Normalize raw counter via log scale to squish heavy tails\n   */\n  private norm(value: number): number {\n    if (value <= 0) return 0;\n    return Math.min(1, Math.log10(value + 1) / 4); // log10(10k) ~= 4\n  }\n\n  private handleError(err: unknown): void {\n    logger.error(err, 'Error while processing Kafka message');\n  }\n}\n\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/*                               Bootstrap Code                               */\n/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n\nasync function main(): Promise<void> {\n  const kafka = new Kafka({\n    clientId: 'pulse-sphere-correlator',\n    brokers: (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS || 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n    connectionTimeout: 3000,\n  });\n\n  // Wire strategies\n  const hpa = new HPAStrategy(\n    Number(process.env.MIN_REPLICAS) || 3,\n    Number(process.env.MAX_REPLICAS) || 60,\n    Number(process.env.RPS_PER_REPLICA) || 100,\n  );\n  const strategy: ScalingStrategy = process.env.STRATEGY === 'cost'\n    ? new CostOptimizedStrategy(hpa, Number(process.env.COST_PER_REPLICA) || 0.07)\n    : hpa;\n\n  // Wire remediation chain\n  const kubeClient: IKubeClient = {\n    async getReplicaCount() {\n      // TODO: integrate @kubernetes/client-node\n      return 5;\n    },\n    async scaleDeployment(_deploy, _replicas) {\n      // TODO: call K8s API\n      logger.info('Mock scaleDeployment called.');\n    },\n  };\n  const pagerDutyClient: IPagerDutyClient = {\n    async triggerIncident(payload) {\n      // TODO: call PagerDuty API\n      logger.warn({ payload }, 'Mock PagerDuty incident');\n    },\n  };\n\n  const scaler = new KubernetesScaler(kubeClient, process.env.TARGET_DEPLOYMENT || 'api-backend');\n  const notifier = new PagerDutyNotifier(pagerDutyClient);\n  const sink = new NullRemediationHandler();\n\n  scaler.setNext(notifier).setNext(sink);\n\n  const service = new ViralityCorrelatorService(kafka, strategy, scaler);\n\n  // Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM / SIGINT\n  const shutdown = async () => {\n    logger.info('Received shutdown signal');\n    await service.stop();\n    process.exit(0);\n  };\n\n  process.on('SIGTERM', shutdown);\n  process.on('SIGINT', shutdown);\n\n  await service.start();\n}\n\nif (require.main === module) {\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises\n  main();\n}\n```\n",
  "structuredPatch": [

Input

  "file_path": "/workspace/project/src/module_29.ts"

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```typescript\n/**\n * PulseSphere SocialOps\n * -------------------------------------------------------------\n * Module 29 \u2013 Social-Aware Anomaly Detection & Escalation Engine\n * -------------------------------------------------------------\n *\n * This module consumes enriched telemetry events (metrics + social\n * interaction signals) from Kafka, detects anomalies using a pluggable\n * Strategy Pattern, notifies observers (Observer Pattern) and triggers a\n * Chain-of-Responsibility based escalation workflow (auto-scaling,\n * alerting, incident-commander).\n *\n * NOTE:\n *  \u2022 All external dependencies are purposely kept minimal to simplify\n *    demo deployment. Replace stubs with concrete implementations in\n *    production (e.g. Prometheus queries, PagerDuty SDK calls\u2026).\n *  \u2022 Configuration is expected via environment variables; see README.\n */\n\nimport { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { Kafka, logLevel, Consumer, EachMessagePayload } from 'kafkajs';\nimport pino from 'pino';\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                         Logger (shared utility)                    */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nconst logger = pino({\n  name: 'module_29:anomaly-detector',\n  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL ?? 'info',\n});\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                                Types                               */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\n/**\n * Raw, enriched telemetry event.\n */\nexport interface MetricEvent {\n  service: string; // e.g. \"timeline-api\"\n  host: string; // e.g. \"ip-10-2-3-4\"\n  timestamp: number; // epoch millis\n  metrics: {\n    cpuUtilization: number; // 0\u20131\n    memoryUtilization: number; // 0\u20131\n    p95LatencyMs: number;\n    requestRateRps: number;\n  };\n  socialSignals: {\n    likes: number;\n    comments: number;\n    shares: number;\n    liveStreamViewers: number;\n  };\n  tags?: Record<string, string>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Anomaly detection result.\n */\nexport interface DetectionResult {\n  isAnomaly: boolean;\n  severity: Severity;\n  reason: string;\n  strategy: string;\n}\n\nexport enum Severity {\n  Low = 'low',\n  Medium = 'medium',\n  High = 'high',\n  Critical = 'critical',\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                         Strategy Pattern                           */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\n/**\n * Pluggable detection strategy contract.\n */\nexport interface DetectionStrategy {\n  readonly name: string;\n  detect(event: MetricEvent): DetectionResult | null;\n}\n\n/**\n * CPU Spike strategy \u2013 identifies sudden CPU utilisation > 85%.\n */\nexport class CpuSpikeStrategy implements DetectionStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'cpu_spike';\n\n  detect(event: MetricEvent): DetectionResult | null {\n    const { cpuUtilization } = event.metrics;\n    if (cpuUtilization > 0.85) {\n      return {\n        isAnomaly: true,\n        severity: cpuUtilization > 0.95 ? Severity.Critical : Severity.High,\n        reason: `CPU utilisation at ${(cpuUtilization * 100).toFixed(2)}%`,\n        strategy: this.name,\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Memory Leak strategy \u2013 memory > 90%.\n */\nexport class MemoryLeakStrategy implements DetectionStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'memory_leak';\n\n  detect(event: MetricEvent): DetectionResult | null {\n    const { memoryUtilization } = event.metrics;\n    if (memoryUtilization > 0.9) {\n      return {\n        isAnomaly: true,\n        severity:\n          memoryUtilization > 0.97 ? Severity.Critical : Severity.High,\n        reason: `Memory utilisation at ${(memoryUtilization * 100).toFixed(\n          2,\n        )}%`,\n        strategy: this.name,\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Viral Surge strategy \u2013 sudden user interest (shares + likes) combined\n * with rising latency.\n */\nexport class ViralSurgeStrategy implements DetectionStrategy {\n  readonly name = 'viral_surge';\n\n  private readonly SOCIAL_THRESHOLD = 10_000; // customizable\n\n  detect(event: MetricEvent): DetectionResult | null {\n    const socialScore =\n      event.socialSignals.likes +\n      event.socialSignals.comments +\n      event.socialSignals.shares +\n      event.socialSignals.liveStreamViewers;\n\n    if (\n      socialScore > this.SOCIAL_THRESHOLD &&\n      event.metrics.p95LatencyMs > 250\n    ) {\n      return {\n        isAnomaly: true,\n        severity:\n          socialScore > this.SOCIAL_THRESHOLD * 2\n            ? Severity.Critical\n            : Severity.Medium,\n        reason: `Viral surge detected (${socialScore} interactions) with latency ${\n          event.metrics.p95LatencyMs\n        } ms`,\n        strategy: this.name,\n      };\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Strategy registry allowing dynamic plug-in/out at runtime.\n */\nexport class StrategyRegistry {\n  private readonly strategies = new Map<string, DetectionStrategy>();\n\n  register(strategy: DetectionStrategy) {\n    if (this.strategies.has(strategy.name)) {\n      logger.warn({ strategy: strategy.name }, 'Strategy already registered');\n      return;\n    }\n    this.strategies.set(strategy.name, strategy);\n    logger.info({ strategy: strategy.name }, 'Strategy registered');\n  }\n\n  unregister(name: string) {\n    this.strategies.delete(name);\n    logger.info({ name }, 'Strategy unregistered');\n  }\n\n  detect(event: MetricEvent): DetectionResult[] {\n    const results: DetectionResult[] = [];\n    for (const strategy of this.strategies.values()) {\n      try {\n        const result = strategy.detect(event);\n        if (result?.isAnomaly) results.push(result);\n      } catch (err) {\n        logger.error(\n          { err, strategy: strategy.name },\n          'Strategy execution error',\n        );\n      }\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                          Observer Pattern                          */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nexport interface AnomalyEvent {\n  metric: MetricEvent;\n  detections: DetectionResult[];\n}\n\nexport type AnomalyListener = (anomaly: AnomalyEvent) => void;\n\n/**\n * Emits \"anomaly\" events to registered listeners.\n */\nexport class AnomalyDetector extends EventEmitter {\n  private readonly registry: StrategyRegistry;\n\n  constructor(registry: StrategyRegistry) {\n    super();\n    this.registry = registry;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Evaluate a single metric event.\n   */\n  evaluate(event: MetricEvent): void {\n    const detections = this.registry.detect(event);\n    if (detections.length) {\n      const anomaly: AnomalyEvent = { metric: event, detections };\n      this.emit('anomaly', anomaly);\n    }\n  }\n\n  addListener(listener: AnomalyListener): void {\n    super.addListener('anomaly', listener);\n  }\n\n  removeListener(listener: AnomalyListener): void {\n    super.removeListener('anomaly', listener);\n  }\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                  Chain-of-Responsibility: Escalation               */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nexport interface EscalationContext {\n  anomaly: AnomalyEvent;\n}\n\nexport abstract class EscalationHandler {\n  private next?: EscalationHandler;\n\n  setNext(next: EscalationHandler): EscalationHandler {\n    this.next = next;\n    return next;\n  }\n\n  async handle(ctx: EscalationContext): Promise<void> {\n    const handled = await this.process(ctx).catch((err) => {\n      logger.error({ err }, 'Handler process failed');\n      return false;\n    });\n\n    if (!handled && this.next) {\n      await this.next.handle(ctx);\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Return true if the handler fully handled the anomaly (no further\n   * escalation needed).\n   */\n  protected abstract process(ctx: EscalationContext): Promise<boolean>;\n}\n\n/**\n * AutoScaler handler \u2013 tries to resolve by adding capacity.\n */\nexport class AutoScalerHandler extends EscalationHandler {\n  protected async process(ctx: EscalationContext): Promise<boolean> {\n    const { anomaly } = ctx;\n    const maxSeverity = getMaxSeverity(anomaly.detections);\n\n    if (maxSeverity === Severity.Low || maxSeverity === Severity.Medium) {\n      const service = anomaly.metric.service;\n      logger.info(\n        { service },\n        'Triggering auto-scaler (kubernetes/hpa) for service',\n      );\n      // TODO: Replace with real orchestrator API call.\n      await fakeNetworkDelay();\n      // Assume scaling succeeded.\n      return true;\n    }\n    return false; // escalate further\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Alert handler \u2013 sends PagerDuty / Slack alerts.\n */\nexport class AlertHandler extends EscalationHandler {\n  protected async process(ctx: EscalationContext): Promise<boolean> {\n    const { anomaly } = ctx;\n    const maxSeverity = getMaxSeverity(anomaly.detections);\n\n    logger.info(\n      { maxSeverity, service: anomaly.metric.service },\n      'Sending alert',\n    );\n    try {\n      // TODO: Integrate with PagerDuty SDK.\n      await fakeNetworkDelay();\n      return maxSeverity !== Severity.Critical; // escalate if critical\n    } catch (err) {\n      logger.error({ err }, 'Alert dispatch failed');\n      return false;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Final escalation \u2013 page incident commander.\n */\nexport class IncidentCommanderHandler extends EscalationHandler {\n  protected async process(ctx: EscalationContext): Promise<boolean> {\n    const { anomaly } = ctx;\n    logger.warn(\n      { anomaly },\n      'Escalating to Incident Commander \u2013 human intervention required',\n    );\n    // Fail-safe: always considered handled after this.\n    await fakeNetworkDelay();\n    return true;\n  }\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                     Kafka Consumer Integration                     */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nexport class AnomalyDetectionService {\n  private readonly detector: AnomalyDetector;\n  private readonly kafka: Kafka;\n  private consumer?: Consumer;\n  private readonly escalationChain: EscalationHandler;\n\n  constructor() {\n    // Strategies\n    const registry = new StrategyRegistry();\n    registry.register(new CpuSpikeStrategy());\n    registry.register(new MemoryLeakStrategy());\n    registry.register(new ViralSurgeStrategy());\n\n    // Detector\n    this.detector = new AnomalyDetector(registry);\n\n    // Escalation chain\n    const autoScaler = new AutoScalerHandler();\n    const alertHandler = new AlertHandler();\n    const commander = new IncidentCommanderHandler();\n    autoScaler.setNext(alertHandler).setNext(commander);\n    this.escalationChain = autoScaler;\n\n    // Observers\n    this.detector.addListener((anomaly) => {\n      this.escalationChain\n        .handle({ anomaly })\n        .catch((err) =>\n          logger.error({ err }, 'Unhandled error during escalation'),\n        );\n    });\n\n    // Kafka\n    this.kafka = new Kafka({\n      clientId: 'pulse-sphere-anomaly-detector',\n      brokers: (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS ?? 'localhost:9092').split(','),\n      logLevel: logLevel.ERROR,\n    });\n  }\n\n  async start(): Promise<void> {\n    const topic = process.env.TELEMETRY_TOPIC ?? 'telemetry.enriched';\n    const groupId =\n      process.env.CONSUMER_GROUP_ID ?? 'anomaly-detector-consumer';\n\n    this.consumer = this.kafka.consumer({ groupId });\n    await this.consumer.connect();\n    await this.consumer.subscribe({ topic, fromBeginning: false });\n\n    logger.info({ topic, groupId }, 'Kafka consumer connected');\n\n    await this.consumer.run({\n      eachMessage: async (payload: EachMessagePayload) => {\n        try {\n          const event = JSON.parse(\n            payload.message.value!.toString('utf8'),\n          ) as MetricEvent;\n          this.detector.evaluate(event);\n        } catch (err) {\n          logger.warn({ err }, 'Invalid metric event received');\n        }\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async stop(): Promise<void> {\n    if (this.consumer) {\n      await this.consumer.disconnect();\n      logger.info('Kafka consumer disconnected');\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                            Utilities                               */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nfunction getMaxSeverity(detections: DetectionResult[]): Severity {\n  const ranking: Severity[] = [\n    Severity.Low,\n    Severity.Medium,\n    Severity.High,\n    Severity.Critical,\n  ];\n  return detections.reduce<Severity>(\n    (prev, curr) =>\n      ranking.indexOf(curr.severity) > ranking.indexOf(prev)\n        ? curr.severity\n        : prev,\n    Severity.Low,\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Simulates network I/O latency for stubbed external calls.\n */\nasync function fakeNetworkDelay(): Promise<void> {\n  return new Promise((res) =>\n    setTimeout(res, Math.random() * 200 + 100 /* 100\u2013300ms */),\n  );\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/*                       Module singleton export                      */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nexport const anomalyDetectionService = new AnomalyDetectionService();\n\n/**\n * Auto-start when executed directly (useful for Docker entrypoints):\n *\n *   node dist/module_29.js\n */\nif (require.main === module) {\n  anomalyDetectionService\n    .start()\n    .then(() => {\n      logger.info('Anomaly detection service started');\n    })\n    .catch((err) => {\n      logger.fatal({ err }, 'Failed to start anomaly detection service');\n      process.exit(1);\n    });\n\n  // Graceful shutdown\n  process.on('SIGINT', async () => {\n    logger.info('Stopping anomaly detection service\u2026');\n    await anomalyDetectionService.stop();\n    process.exit(0);\n  });\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_29.ts",
    "numLines": 478,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 478
  },
  "type": "text"
}
